title: Travel Phrases
description: Short phrases for transport, directions, and common travel moments.

cards.definition_en: A place where airplanes arrive and leave.

examples.es: Mi vuelo sale del aeropuerto a las 9 de la mañana.
examples.en: My flight departs from the Airport at 9 a.m.

examples.es: Nos encontramos con el taxista en la zona de llegadas del aeropuerto.
examples.en: We met the taxi driver at the Airport arrivals area.

examples.es: Le llamé a mi amigo para decirle que lo esperaría en el Aeropuerto para tomar el shuttle.
examples.en: I called my friend to tell him I would wait at the Airport for the shuttle.

cards.example_sentence: My flight departs from the Airport at 9 a.m.
cards.example_es: Mi vuelo sale del aeropuerto a las 9 de la mañana.
cards.example_en: My flight departs from the Airport at 9 a.m.

cards.definition_en: A question used to ask for the location of a station.
synonyms_en: Where can I find the station?

examples.es: Al llegar al aeropuerto, necesitaba tomar el tren hasta el hotel, así que pregunté en el mostrador de información: «¿Dónde está la estación?»
examples.en: After arriving at the airport, I needed to take the train to the hotel, so I asked at the information desk: "Where is the station?"

examples.es: En el hotel, necesitaba encontrar la estación de tren, así que le pregunté al recepcionista: '¿Dónde está la estación?'
examples.en: At the hotel, I needed to find the train station, so I asked the receptionist, 'Where is the station?'

examples.es: En el centro comercial, necesito ir a la estación para tomar el tren al centro, así que le pregunto a un dependiente: "¿Dónde está la estación?"
examples.en: At the shopping center, I need to go to the station to take the train downtown, so I ask a shop assistant: "Where is the station?"

cards.example_sentence: After arriving at the airport, I needed to take the train to the hotel, so I asked at the information desk: "Where is the station?"
cards.example_es: Al llegar al aeropuerto, necesitaba tomar el tren hasta el hotel, así que pregunté en el mostrador de información: «¿Dónde está la estación?»
cards.example_en: After arriving at the airport, I needed to take the train to the hotel, so I asked at the information desk: "Where is the station?"

cards.definition_en: A piece of paper or digital document that gives you permission to travel or enter a place.

examples.es: Quiero comprar un billete de tren a Barcelona.
examples.en: I want to buy a Ticket to Barcelona.

examples.es: El guardia me pidió el billete antes de entrar al metro.
examples.en: The guard asked me for my Ticket before I entered the subway.

examples.es: Olvidé mi billete en el hotel y no pude subir al autobús.
examples.en: I forgot my Ticket at the hotel and couldn't get on the bus.

cards.example_sentence: I want to buy a Ticket to Barcelona.
cards.example_es: Quiero comprar un billete de tren a Barcelona.
cards.example_en: I want to buy a Ticket to Barcelona.

cards.definition_en: A case used for carrying clothes and personal items when traveling.

examples.es: Puse mi maleta en el compartimento superior del tren.
examples.en: I placed my suitcase in the overhead compartment of the train.

examples.es: En la cinta de equipaje recogí mi maleta azul.
examples.en: At the baggage claim I retrieved my suitcase from the carousel.

examples.es: El portero del hotel guardó mi maleta en la consigna.
examples.en: The hotel porter stored my suitcase in the luggage room.

cards.example_sentence: I placed my suitcase in the overhead compartment of the train.
cards.example_es: Puse mi maleta en el compartimento superior del tren.
cards.example_en: I placed my suitcase in the overhead compartment of the train.

cards.definition_en: A phrase used to say that you do not know where you are or where to go.
synonyms_en: I don't know where I am

examples.es: Estoy perdido, ¿puedes indicarme cómo llegar al museo de la ciudad?
examples.en: Since I am lost, could you tell me how to get to the city museum?

examples.es: Estoy perdido y no sé cómo llegar a la estación de tren.
examples.en: I am lost and I don't know how to get to the train station.

examples.es: Estoy perdido, ¿me podría indicar dónde está la parada de autobús más cercana?
examples.en: I am lost, can you point me to the nearest bus stop?

cards.example_sentence: Since I am lost, could you tell me how to get to the city museum?
cards.example_es: Estoy perdido, ¿puedes indicarme cómo llegar al museo de la ciudad?
cards.example_en: Since I am lost, could you tell me how to get to the city museum?

cards.definition_en: An official document issued by a government that certifies the holder's identity and citizenship and allows them to travel internationally.

examples.es: Necesito renovar mi pasaporte antes de viajar.
examples.en: I need to renew my passport before traveling.

examples.es: El oficial de inmigración pidió mi pasaporte.
examples.en: The immigration officer asked for my passport.

examples.es: Perdí mi pasaporte al cruzar la frontera de México a Estados Unidos.
examples.en: I lost my passport while crossing the border from Mexico to the US.

cards.example_sentence: I need to renew my passport before traveling.
cards.example_es: Necesito renovar mi pasaporte antes de viajar.
cards.example_en: I need to renew my passport before traveling.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a busy port where you hand over a pass, the Spanish pasaporte glows.

cards.definition_en: A document issued by an airline that allows a passenger to board a flight.

examples.es: Necesito presentar mi tarjeta de embarque antes de abordar el avión.
examples.en: I need to show my boarding pass before boarding the plane.

examples.es: Necesito imprimir mi tarjeta de embarque en el mostrador de facturación.
examples.en: I need to print my boarding pass at the check-in counter.

examples.es: Olvidé mi tarjeta de embarque en el control de seguridad.
examples.en: I forgot my boarding pass at the security checkpoint.

cards.example_sentence: I need to show my boarding pass before boarding the plane.
cards.example_es: Necesito presentar mi tarjeta de embarque antes de abordar el avión.
cards.example_en: I need to show my boarding pass before boarding the plane.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a wooden board holding a pass on a tarjeta, ready for the embarque flight.

cards.definition_en: A gate or area where passengers board a plane.

examples.es: La puerta de embarque para nuestro vuelo a Madrid abre a las 3 p.m.
examples.en: The boarding gate for our flight to Madrid opens at 3 PM.

examples.es: Nuestra puerta de embarque ha cambiado a la puerta 10.
examples.en: Our boarding gate has changed to gate 10.

examples.es: Por favor, diríjase a la puerta de embarque número 5.
examples.en: Please proceed to boarding gate number 5.

cards.example_sentence: The boarding gate for our flight to Madrid opens at 3 PM.
cards.example_es: La puerta de embarque para nuestro vuelo a Madrid abre a las 3 p.m.
cards.example_en: The boarding gate for our flight to Madrid opens at 3 PM.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a bored gate (boarding gate) swinging open like a giant puerta for the airplane.

cards.definition_en: luggage that is checked in for transport on a flight.

examples.es: Voy a facturar equipaje antes de abordar el vuelo.
examples.en: I'm going to check luggage before boarding the flight.

examples.es: Necesito facturar equipaje porque mi maleta es demasiado grande para llevarla conmigo.
examples.en: I need to check luggage because my suitcase is too large to carry with me.

examples.es: El agente de la aerolínea me ayudó a facturar equipaje en el mostrador principal.
examples.en: The airline agent helped me check luggage at the main counter.

cards.example_sentence: I'm going to check luggage before boarding the flight.
cards.example_es: Voy a facturar equipaje antes de abordar el vuelo.
cards.example_en: I'm going to check luggage before boarding the flight.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a CHEQUE stamped on a LUGGAGE cart as you check in your bags.

cards.definition_en: A bag that a passenger is allowed to bring onto an aircraft without checking it in.

examples.es: Por favor, coloque su equipaje de mano en el compartimento superior.
examples.en: Please place your carry-on bag in the overhead bin.

examples.es: El agente de la aerolínea pesó mi equipaje de mano antes de abordar.
examples.en: The airline agent weighed my carry-on bag before boarding.

examples.es: Solo traigo una mochila como equipaje de mano para este viaje corto.
examples.en: I am only bringing a backpack as a carry-on bag for this short trip.

cards.example_sentence: Please place your carry-on bag in the overhead bin.
cards.example_es: Por favor, coloque su equipaje de mano en el compartimento superior.
cards.example_en: Please place your carry-on bag in the overhead bin.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a hand (mano) saying carry on while holding a bag.

cards.definition_en: A period of time by which something is late or postponed.

examples.es: El vuelo tiene un retraso de dos horas debido a la tormenta.
examples.en: The flight has a delay of two hours due to the storm.

examples.es: Debido a un retraso en el tráfico, llegaremos tarde a la estación de tren.
examples.en: Due to a delay in traffic, we will arrive late to the train station.

examples.es: El pasajero se quejó por el largo retraso en la salida del autobús.
examples.en: The passenger complained about the long delay in the bus departure.

cards.example_sentence: The flight has a delay of two hours due to the storm.
cards.example_es: El vuelo tiene un retraso de dos horas debido a la tormenta.
cards.example_en: The flight has a delay of two hours due to the storm.
cards.mnemonic_en: A lazy 'de lay' cat drags a Spanish 'retraso' rope, making everything run late.

cards.definition_en: having been called off or terminated

examples.es: El vuelo fue cancelado.
examples.en: The flight was cancelled.

examples.es: Debido a la tormenta, el tren ha sido cancelado.
examples.en: Due to the storm, the train has been cancelled.

examples.es: Mi reserva de hotel aparece como cancelado en el sistema.
examples.en: My hotel reservation appears as cancelled in the system.

cards.example_sentence: The flight was cancelled.
cards.example_es: El vuelo fue cancelado.
cards.example_en: The flight was cancelled.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a red stamp reading CANCELADO over the word cancelled

cards.definition_en: the act or process of arriving at a destination

examples.es: La llegada del tren se retrasó una hora.
examples.en: The arrival of the train was delayed by an hour.

examples.es: Por favor, consulte la pantalla para ver la hora exacta de llegada de su vuelo.
examples.en: Please check the screen to see the exact arrival time of your flight.

examples.es: Por favor, diríjase a la puerta de llegada para recoger a sus familiares.
examples.en: Please head to the arrival gate to pick up your relatives.

cards.example_sentence: The arrival of the train was delayed by an hour.
cards.example_es: La llegada del tren se retrasó una hora.
cards.example_en: The arrival of the train was delayed by an hour.
cards.mnemonic_en: The train pulls in, and the big board flashes LLEGADA, signaling the arrival.

cards.definition_en: the act of leaving or the point at which someone or something departs.

examples.es: La salida del tren está programada para las 8:00 a.m.
examples.en: The departure of the train is scheduled for 8:00 a.m.

examples.es: El vuelo ha sido cancelado, así que debemos esperar a que anuncien una nueva hora de salida.
examples.en: The flight has been cancelled, so we must wait for them to announce a new Departure.

examples.es: Busque la puerta de salida en su tarjeta de embarque.
examples.en: Look for the departure gate on your boarding pass.

cards.example_sentence: The departure of the train is scheduled for 8:00 a.m.
cards.example_es: La salida del tren está programada para las 8:00 a.m.
cards.example_en: The departure of the train is scheduled for 8:00 a.m.
cards.mnemonic_en: When the train leaves, the conductor shouts 'Salida!' and the departure begins.

cards.definition_en: The authority that regulates and taxes goods entering a country.

examples.es: El paquete llegó a la aduana sin problemas.
examples.en: The package arrived at customs without any problems.

examples.es: Debo declarar mis artículos electrónicos en la aduana antes de salir del aeropuerto.
examples.en: I must declare my electronic items at customs before leaving the airport.

examples.es: El oficial de la aduana revisó mi pasaporte y mi maleta.
examples.en: The officer at customs checked my passport and my suitcase.

cards.example_sentence: The package arrived at customs without any problems.
cards.example_es: El paquete llegó a la aduana sin problemas.
cards.example_en: The package arrived at customs without any problems.
cards.mnemonic_en: Customs officer slapped an ADOANA stamp on my passport as I entered.

cards.definition_en: A procedure to verify safety or compliance, often involving inspection of items or people.

examples.es: El control de seguridad en el aeropuerto fue muy riguroso.
examples.en: The security check at the airport was very strict.

examples.es: Por favor, saque su computadora de la maleta antes de pasar por el control de seguridad.
examples.en: Please take your laptop out of your bag before going through the security check.

examples.es: Hay una fila muy larga para llegar al control de seguridad.
examples.en: There is a very long line to get to the security check.

cards.example_sentence: The security check at the airport was very strict.
cards.example_es: El control de seguridad en el aeropuerto fue muy riguroso.
cards.example_en: The security check at the airport was very strict.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a guard saying 'Sure, I check' while holding a 'control' badge.

cards.definition_en: the act of flying through the air

examples.es: El vuelo de mañana está retrasado.
examples.en: The flight tomorrow is delayed.

examples.es: Por favor, confirme el número de su vuelo en la pantalla.
examples.en: Please confirm your flight number on the screen.

examples.es: Debo hacer el check-in antes de abordar mi vuelo.
examples.en: I must check in before boarding my flight.

cards.example_sentence: The flight tomorrow is delayed.
cards.example_es: El vuelo de mañana está retrasado.
cards.example_en: The flight tomorrow is delayed.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a bird taking a flight, shouting 'vuelo!' as it soars.

cards.definition_en: A piece of furniture or structure designed for sitting.

examples.es: El asiento del autobús estaba muy cómodo.
examples.en: The seat on the bus was very comfortable.

examples.es: Por favor, abróchese el cinturón de seguridad mientras esté en su asiento.
examples.en: Please fasten your seat belt while you are in your seat.

examples.es: El número de mi asiento está escrito en la tarjeta de embarque.
examples.en: My seat number is written on the boarding pass.

cards.example_sentence: The seat on the bus was very comfortable.
cards.example_es: El asiento del autobús estaba muy cómodo.
cards.example_en: The seat on the bus was very comfortable.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a comfy seat labeled 'A' for Asiento, the Spanish word for a place to sit.

cards.definition_en: A seat located by a window, typically on a train, plane, or theater, offering a view.

examples.es: Me senté en la ventanilla del tren para disfrutar de la vista.
examples.en: I sat in the window seat of the train to enjoy the view.

examples.es: Al reservar mi vuelo, pedí una ventanilla para poder ver las nubes.
examples.en: When booking my flight, I requested a window seat so I could see the clouds.

examples.es: El pasajero prefirió una ventanilla para descansar la cabeza contra el cristal durante el viaje en autobús.
examples.en: The passenger preferred a window seat to rest his head against the glass during the bus trip.

cards.example_sentence: I sat in the window seat of the train to enjoy the view.
cards.example_es: Me senté en la ventanilla del tren para disfrutar de la vista.
cards.example_en: I sat in the window seat of the train to enjoy the view.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a tiny vent in a plane; the window seat feels like a ventanilla you look through.

cards.definition_en: A seat located next to an aisle in a vehicle or theater.

examples.es: Prefiero reservar un asiento en el pasillo para estirar las piernas durante el vuelo.
examples.en: I prefer to book an aisle seat to stretch my legs during the flight.

examples.es: El asistente de vuelo me pidió que guardara mi maleta antes de llegar a mi pasillo.
examples.en: The flight attendant asked me to stow my bag before reaching my aisle seat.

examples.es: Si eliges un asiento en el pasillo, podrás salir del tren más rápido al llegar a la estación.
examples.en: If you choose an aisle seat, you will be able to exit the train faster upon arriving at the station.

cards.example_sentence: I prefer to book an aisle seat to stretch my legs during the flight.
cards.example_es: Prefiero reservar un asiento en el pasillo para estirar las piernas durante el vuelo.
cards.example_en: I prefer to book an aisle seat to stretch my legs during the flight.
cards.mnemonic_en: I pass low down the aisle to my seat.

cards.definition_en: to get on or into a vehicle, such as a plane or ship.

examples.es: El pasajero debe embarcar antes de la salida.
examples.en: The passenger must board before departure.

examples.es: Es hora de embarcar en el avión hacia Madrid.
examples.en: It is time to board the plane to Madrid.

examples.es: Los viajeros comienzan a embarcar por la puerta número cinco.
examples.en: The travelers begin to board at gate number five.

cards.example_sentence: The passenger must board before departure.
cards.example_es: El pasajero debe embarcar antes de la salida.
cards.example_en: The passenger must board before departure.
cards.mnemonic_en: A bored sailor finally gets to embarcar onto the ship.

cards.definition_en: to leave a vehicle or place, especially by disembarking

examples.es: Los pasajeros deben desembarcar del autobús antes de llegar a la parada.
examples.en: Passengers must get off the bus before arriving at the stop.

examples.es: Es necesario desembarcar del tren cuando lleguemos a la estación central.
examples.en: It is necessary to get off the train when we arrive at the central station.

examples.es: Todos los turistas tienen que desembarcar del crucero para el tour de la mañana.
examples.en: All tourists have to get off the cruise ship for the morning tour.

cards.example_sentence: Passengers must get off the bus before arriving at the stop.
cards.example_es: Los pasajeros deben desembarcar del autobús antes de llegar a la parada.
cards.example_en: Passengers must get off the bus before arriving at the stop.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a desert gate opening as you get off the boat, shouting 'Desembarcar!'

cards.definition_en: a flat surface used for displaying or serving items, often found in stores or restaurants.

examples.es: El mostrador del café está lleno de tazas.
examples.en: The counter at the café is full of cups.

examples.es: Por favor, diríjase al mostrador de facturación para registrar su equipaje.
examples.en: Please go to the check-in counter to register your luggage.

examples.es: El cliente espera su turno frente al mostrador de información turística.
examples.en: The customer is waiting for their turn at the information counter.

cards.example_sentence: The counter at the café is full of cups.
cards.example_es: El mostrador del café está lleno de tazas.
cards.example_en: The counter at the café is full of cups.
cards.mnemonic_en: The counter displays the most rad door.

cards.definition_en: A place where passengers board or disembark from transportation, such as a bus or train station.

examples.es: El tren llega a la terminal a las 5 p.m.
examples.en: The train arrives at the terminal at 5 p.m.

cards.example_sentence: The train arrives at the terminal at 5 p.m.
cards.example_es: El tren llega a la terminal a las 5 p.m.
cards.example_en: The train arrives at the terminal at 5 p.m.

cards.definition_en: A modification or alteration of a gate.

examples.es: Por favor, revisa las pantallas de información porque hubo un cambio de puerta para nuestro vuelo a Madrid.
examples.en: Please check the monitors because there was a gate change for our flight to Madrid.

examples.es: Escuchamos un anuncio sobre un cambio de puerta en el aeropuerto.
examples.en: We heard an announcement about a gate change at the airport.

examples.es: Debido al retraso, hubo un cambio de puerta inesperado.
examples.en: Due to the delay, there was an unexpected gate change.

cards.example_sentence: Please check the monitors because there was a gate change for our flight to Madrid.
cards.example_es: Por favor, revisa las pantallas de información porque hubo un cambio de puerta para nuestro vuelo a Madrid.
cards.example_en: Please check the monitors because there was a gate change for our flight to Madrid.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a gate that suddenly changes like a door flipping open.

cards.definition_en: A raised area where passengers wait for trains or buses.

examples.es: El tren llegó al andén y los pasajeros comenzaron a bajar.
examples.en: The train arrived at the platform and passengers began to disembark.

examples.es: Por favor, espere detrás de la línea amarilla en el andén hasta que el metro se detenga por completo.
examples.en: Please wait behind the yellow line on the platform until the subway comes to a complete stop.

examples.es: Corrí hacia el andén número cuatro porque mi tren salía en menos de dos minutos.
examples.en: I ran toward platform number four because my train was leaving in less than two minutes.

cards.example_sentence: The train arrived at the platform and passengers began to disembark.
cards.example_es: El tren llegó al andén y los pasajeros comenzaron a bajar.
cards.example_en: The train arrived at the platform and passengers began to disembark.
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a flat plate (plat) on a train's Andén, a perfect platform.

cards.definition_en: A plan that lists events or tasks and the times at which they will occur.

examples.es: El horario de clases se publica cada semana.
examples.en: The class schedule is posted every week.

examples.es: Por favor, consulte el horario de salida de los trenes en la pantalla.
examples.en: Please check the train departure schedule on the screen.

examples.es: El autobús se retrasó porque no cumplió con el horario establecido.
examples.en: The bus was delayed because it did not follow the established schedule.

cards.example_sentence: The class schedule is posted every week.
cards.example_es: El horario de clases se publica cada semana.
cards.example_en: The class schedule is posted every week.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a jewel-shaped clock labeled schedule hanging on a Spanish horario board.

cards.definition_en: A rail vehicle that carries passengers or freight along a railway track.

examples.es: El tren llegará a la estación a las ocho.
examples.en: The train will arrive at the station at eight.

examples.es: Debemos comprar el boleto de tren antes de subir al vagón.
examples.en: We must buy the train ticket before boarding the carriage.

examples.es: El próximo tren sale de la plataforma número cuatro.
examples.en: The next train departs from platform number four.

cards.example_sentence: The train will arrive at the station at eight.
cards.example_es: El tren llegará a la estación a las ocho.
cards.example_en: The train will arrive at the station at eight.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a train shouting 'Tren!' as it whistles down the tracks.

cards.definition_en: A large motor vehicle that carries passengers by road, typically on a fixed route.

examples.es: El autobús llega a las ocho.
examples.en: The bus arrives at eight.

examples.es: Debemos esperar el autobús en la parada de la esquina.
examples.en: We must wait for the bus at the corner stop.

examples.es: El conductor del autobús revisó mi boleto al subir.
examples.en: The bus driver checked my ticket when I boarded.

cards.example_sentence: The bus arrives at eight.
cards.example_es: El autobús llega a las ocho.
cards.example_en: The bus arrives at eight.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a bright yellow bus labeled autobús zooming down the road.

cards.definition_en: A designated place where buses pick up and drop off passengers.

examples.es: Voy a la parada de autobús para coger el bus.
examples.en: I'm going to the bus stop to catch the bus.

examples.es: El turista espera bajo la lluvia en la parada de autobús.
examples.en: The tourist is waiting in the rain at the bus stop.

examples.es: Debes bajar en la próxima parada de autobús para llegar al museo.
examples.en: You need to get off at the next bus stop to reach the museum.

cards.example_sentence: I'm going to the bus stop to catch the bus.
cards.example_es: Voy a la parada de autobús para coger el bus.
cards.example_en: I'm going to the bus stop to catch the bus.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a bus pulling up at a bright parada sign and stopping.

cards.definition_en: A vehicle for hire that transports passengers for a fare.

examples.es: Necesito un taxi para ir al aeropuerto.
examples.en: I need a taxi to get to the airport.

cards.example_sentence: I need a taxi to get to the airport.
cards.example_es: Necesito un taxi para ir al aeropuerto.
cards.example_en: I need a taxi to get to the airport.

cards.definition_en: An underground railway system used for urban transit.

examples.es: Voy al metro cada mañana para ir al trabajo.
examples.en: I take the subway every morning to get to work.

examples.es: Debes bajar dos paradas más en el metro para llegar al museo.
examples.en: You need to ride the subway for two more stops to reach the museum.

examples.es: Compra un billete sencillo de metro en la máquina automática.
examples.en: Buy a single ticket for the subway at the automated machine.

cards.example_sentence: I take the subway every morning to get to work.
cards.example_es: Voy al metro cada mañana para ir al trabajo.
cards.example_en: I take the subway every morning to get to work.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a submarine (sub) navigating a metro tunnel as the city’s underground way.

cards.definition_en: A journey that starts and ends at the same place.

examples.es: Compré un billete de ida y vuelta para mi viaje a Madrid.
examples.en: I bought a round trip ticket for my trip to Madrid.

examples.es: El precio del pasaje de ida y vuelta es más barato que comprar dos boletos sencillos.
examples.en: The price of a round trip ticket is cheaper than buying two one-way tickets.

examples.es: Necesito reservar un vuelo de ida y vuelta para mis vacaciones en diciembre.
examples.en: I need to book a round trip flight for my vacation in December.

cards.example_sentence: I bought a round trip ticket for my trip to Madrid.
cards.example_es: Compré un billete de ida y vuelta para mi viaje a Madrid.
cards.example_en: I bought a round trip ticket for my trip to Madrid.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a round circle (ronda) that trips you back home, like an ida y vuelta.

cards.definition_en: A ticket that allows travel in only one direction, not a return.

examples.es: El precio del solo ida es más barato que el del ida y vuelta.
examples.en: The price of a one-way ticket is cheaper than that of a round-trip ticket.

examples.es: Para este viaje, solo necesito comprar un solo ida porque me quedaré a vivir allí.
examples.en: For this trip, I only need to buy a one-way ticket because I am going to stay and live there.

examples.es: El agente de viajes me preguntó si prefería un solo ida o si pensaba regresar pronto.
examples.en: The travel agent asked me if I preferred a one-way ticket or if I planned to return soon.

cards.example_sentence: The price of a one-way ticket is cheaper than that of a round-trip ticket.

cards.example_sentence: I need an adapter because the plug on my charger does not fit this outlet.

cards.example_en: I need an adapter because the plug on my charger does not fit this outlet.

cards.definition_en: A device that allows one type of connection to be used with another.

examples.es: Necesito un adaptador para conectar mi portátil al enchufe europeo.
examples.en: I need an adapter to plug my laptop into the European outlet.

examples.es: ¿Tienen algún adaptador en recepción? Olvidé el mío y no puedo cargar el teléfono.
examples.en: Do you have an adapter at the front desk? I forgot mine and cannot charge my phone.

examples.es: Este adaptador universal funciona en más de cien países diferentes.
examples.en: This universal adapter works in more than one hundred different countries.

cards.example_sentence: I need an adapter to plug my laptop into the European outlet.
cards.example_es: Necesito un adaptador para conectar mi portátil al enchufe europeo.
cards.example_en: I need an adapter to plug my laptop into the European outlet.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize an adapter plugging a Spanish adaptador into a socket, the words sound identical.

cards.definition_en: Money in the form of coins and banknotes that can be used for transactions.

examples.es: La pequeña tienda de recuerdos solo acepta dinero en efectivo.
examples.en: The small souvenir shop only accepts cash.

examples.es: El conductor del autobús dijo que solo podemos pagar el boleto con dinero en efectivo.
examples.en: The bus driver said we can only pay for the ticket with cash.

examples.en: The hotel needs a deposit in cash for the room key.

cards.example_sentence: The small souvenir shop only accepts cash.
cards.example_es: La pequeña tienda de recuerdos solo acepta dinero en efectivo.
cards.example_en: The small souvenir shop only accepts cash.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a cash box, a caja overflowing with dinero.

cards.definition_en: A small, flat piece of paper, cardboard, or plastic used for identification, payment, or as a playing piece.

examples.es: Debes pasar tu tarjeta por el lector para pagar el autobús.
examples.en: You must tap your card on the reader to pay for the bus.

examples.es: Necesito una tarjeta nueva para abrir la puerta de mi habitación de hotel.
examples.en: I need a new key card to open my hotel room door.

examples.es: ¿Este restaurante acepta tarjeta de crédito para pagar la cuenta?
examples.en: Does this restaurant accept a credit card to pay the bill?

cards.example_sentence: You must tap your card on the reader to pay for the bus.
cards.example_es: Debes pasar tu tarjeta por el lector para pagar el autobús.
cards.example_en: You must tap your card on the reader to pay for the bus.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a playing card covered in dark tar with a tiny jet sticker echoing tarjeta

cards.definition_en: A small, flat piece of metal used as money.

examples.es: Necesito una moneda para usar el casillero de la estación.
examples.en: I need a coin to use the station locker.

examples.es: Guardé una moneda de plata como recuerdo de mi viaje.
examples.en: I kept a silver coin as a souvenir of my trip.

examples.es: Tira una moneda a la fuente para tener buena suerte.
examples.en: Throw a coin into the fountain for good luck.

cards.example_sentence: I need a coin to use the station locker.
cards.example_es: Necesito una moneda para usar el casillero de la estación.
cards.example_en: I need a coin to use the station locker.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a shiny coin stamped with the word moneda on its edge.

cards.definition_en: the act of becoming different

examples.es: No tengo suficiente cambio para pagar el parquímetro.
examples.en: I do not have enough change to pay for the parking meter.

examples.es: Por favor, revise la pantalla por cualquier cambio en la puerta de salida.
examples.en: Please check the screen for any change to the departure gate.

examples.es: Siempre empaco un cambio de ropa en mi maleta de mano.
examples.en: I always pack a change of clothes in my carry-on bag.

cards.example_sentence: I do not have enough change to pay for the parking meter.
cards.example_es: No tengo suficiente cambio para pagar el parquímetro.
cards.example_en: I do not have enough change to pay for the parking meter.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a coin flipping and you hear cambio as it changes.

cards.definition_en: A written acknowledgment of having received something, typically a payment or goods.

examples.es: Necesito un recibo del taxi para mi jefe.
examples.en: I need a receipt for the taxi for my boss.

examples.es: Necesitas el recibo para devolver la maleta a la tienda.
examples.en: You need the receipt to return the suitcase to the store.

examples.es: El camarero me dio un recibo después de que pagué la cuenta.
examples.en: The waiter gave me a receipt after I paid the bill.

cards.example_sentence: I need a receipt for the taxi for my boss.
cards.example_es: Necesito un recibo del taxi para mi jefe.
cards.example_en: I need a receipt for the taxi for my boss.
cards.mnemonic_en: I hand the cashier a receipt, thinking of my recibo tucked in my pocket.

cards.definition_en: the amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for something.

examples.es: El precio de la entrada es de veinte euros.
examples.en: The price of the ticket is twenty euros.

examples.es: ¿Cuál es el precio por una noche en este hotel?
examples.en: What is the price for one night in this hotel?

examples.es: El precio de este recuerdo no está marcado en la etiqueta.
examples.en: The price of this souvenir is not marked on the tag.

cards.example_sentence: The price of the ticket is twenty euros.
cards.example_es: El precio de la entrada es de veinte euros.
cards.example_en: The price of the ticket is twenty euros.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a price tag shouting precio as it slides down a cash register.

cards.definition_en: Not closed; allowing passage or access.

examples.es: El museo está abierto de nueve a cinco todos los días.
examples.en: The museum is open from nine to five every day.

examples.es: El restaurante del hotel está abierto para la cena.
examples.en: The hotel restaurant is open for dinner.

examples.es: ¿Está el banco abierto los sábados por la mañana?
examples.en: Is the bank open on Saturday mornings?

cards.example_sentence: The museum is open from nine to five every day.
cards.example_es: El museo está abierto de nueve a cinco todos los días.
cards.example_en: The museum is open from nine to five every day.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine an open door shouting abierto as you walk in.

cards.definition_en: Not open; shut.

examples.es: El museo está cerrado los lunes, así que no podemos entrar.
examples.en: The museum is closed on Mondays, so we cannot go inside.

examples.es: La taquilla está cerrada, así que no puedo comprar un billete.
examples.en: The ticket office is closed, so I cannot buy a ticket.

examples.es: Llegamos tarde y la puerta de embarque está cerrada.
examples.en: We arrived late and the boarding gate is closed.

cards.example_sentence: The museum is closed on Mondays, so we cannot go inside.
cards.example_es: El museo está cerrado los lunes, así que no podemos entrar.
cards.example_en: The museum is closed on Mondays, so we cannot go inside.
cards.mnemonic_en: Closed sounds like Spanish 'cerrado', picture a door shut with a big red 'C' lock.

cards.definition_en: Assistance or support given to someone in need.

examples.es: Necesito ayuda con mi equipaje pesado en el hotel.
examples.en: I need help with my heavy luggage at the hotel.

examples.es: El viajero perdido le pidió ayuda al oficial de policía.
examples.en: The lost traveler asked the police officer for help.

examples.es: La azafata le ofreció ayuda al pasajero de la tercera edad.
examples.en: The flight attendant offered help to the elderly passenger.

cards.example_sentence: I need help with my heavy luggage at the hotel.
cards.example_es: Necesito ayuda con mi equipaje pesado en el hotel.
cards.example_en: I need help with my heavy luggage at the hotel.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a superhero shouting 'Ayuda!' as he lifts a heavy box, reminding you that help sounds like ayuda.

cards.definition_en: to contact the police for assistance or to report a crime
main_translations_es: Ponte en contacto con la policía
collocations: call the police if there's a fire
call the police for a robbery
call the police to report a crime

examples.es: En caso de emergencia, llama a la policía.
examples.en: In case of emergency, call the police.

examples.es: ¡Alguien robó mi cámara! ¡Llama a la policía ahora mismo!
examples.en: Someone stole my camera! Call the police right now!

examples.es: Hubo un accidente en la carretera, así que por favor llama a la policía.
examples.en: There was an accident on the road, so please call the police.

cards.example_sentence: In case of emergency, call the police.
cards.example_es: En caso de emergencia, llama a la policía.
cards.example_en: In case of emergency, call the police.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a llama dialing the phone to call the police.

cards.definition_en: A statement expressing the speaker's requirement for a medical professional.
collocations: I need a doctor right now
I need a doctor for my child
I need a doctor at the hospital

examples.es: Necesito un médico para revisar mi dolor de cabeza.
examples.en: I need a doctor to check my headache.

examples.es: Por favor, llame a una ambulancia porque necesito un médico de inmediato.
examples.en: Please call an ambulance because I need a doctor immediately.

examples.es: Me duele mucho el pecho y necesito un médico con urgencia.
examples.en: My chest hurts a lot and I need a doctor urgently.

cards.example_sentence: I need a doctor to check my headache.
cards.example_es: Necesito un médico para revisar mi dolor de cabeza.
cards.example_en: I need a doctor to check my headache.
cards.mnemonic_en: When I shout 'I need a doctor', I picture saying 'necesito doctor' to a panicked patient.

cards.definition_en: A sudden, urgent situation requiring immediate action.

examples.es: En caso de una emergencia, por favor use la salida más cercana.
examples.en: In case of an emergency, please use the nearest exit.

examples.es: Debe llamar al nueve-uno-uno solo durante una emergencia real.
examples.en: You should call nine-one-one only during a real emergency.

examples.es: El tren se detuvo debido a una emergencia médica a bordo.
examples.en: The train stopped because of a medical emergency on board.

cards.example_sentence: In case of an emergency, please use the nearest exit.
cards.example_es: En caso de una emergencia, por favor use la salida más cercana.
cards.example_en: In case of an emergency, please use the nearest exit.
cards.mnemonic_en: A flashing red alarm makes me think emergency, like the word emerges from the chaos

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker has lost their passport.
main_translations_es: He perdido mi documento de viaje
collocations: I lost my passport at the airport
I lost my passport while traveling
I lost my passport and had to get a replacement
I lost my passport and can't travel

examples.es: He perdido mi pasaporte, así que necesito solicitar uno nuevo.
examples.en: I lost my passport, so I need to apply for a new one.

examples.es: No puedo abordar el avión porque he perdido mi pasaporte en la terminal.
examples.en: I cannot board the plane because I lost my passport in the terminal.

examples.es: Estoy muy preocupado porque he perdido mi pasaporte y no puedo salir del país.
examples.en: I am very worried because I lost my passport and I cannot leave the country.

cards.example_sentence: I lost my passport, so I need to apply for a new one.
cards.example_es: He perdido mi pasaporte, así que necesito solicitar uno nuevo.
cards.example_en: I lost my passport, so I need to apply for a new one.
cards.mnemonic_en: I lost my passport, just like I lost my 'pasaporte' on a windy beach.

cards.definition_en: A sentence expressing that the speaker has misplaced or lost their wallet.
collocations: I lost my wallet at the restaurant
I lost my wallet in the subway
I lost my wallet and had to cancel my cards

examples.es: Necesito llamar al banco para cancelar mis tarjetas porque he perdido mi cartera en la estación de tren.
examples.en: I need to call the bank to cancel my cards because I lost my wallet at the train station.

examples.es: No puedo pagar la cena porque he perdido mi cartera.
examples.en: I cannot pay for dinner because I lost my wallet.

examples.es: Creo que he perdido mi cartera en el taxi que tomé al aeropuerto.
examples.en: I think I lost my wallet in the taxi I took to the airport.

cards.example_sentence: I need to call the bank to cancel my cards because I lost my wallet at the train station.
cards.example_es: Necesito llamar al banco para cancelar mis tarjetas porque he perdido mi cartera en la estación de tren.
cards.example_en: I need to call the bank to cancel my cards because I lost my wallet at the train station.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a carter dropping his wallet on the road, shouting lost my wallet!

cards.definition_en: I am ill or unwell.
collocations: I am sick with a cold
I am sick and need to rest
I am sick to my stomach

examples.en: I have a high fever and a stomach ache, so I am sick and need to see the hotel doctor.

examples.es: Necesito quedarme en la habitación del hotel hoy porque estoy enfermo.
examples.en: I need to stay in the hotel room today because I am sick.

examples.es: Tengo mucha tos y dolor de garganta, así que estoy enfermo y necesito encontrar una farmacia.
examples.en: I have a bad cough and a sore throat, so I am sick and need to find a pharmacy.

cards.example_sentence: I have a high fever and a stomach ache, so I am sick and need to see the hotel doctor.
cards.example_es: Tengo mucha fiebre y dolor de estómago, así que estoy enfermo y necesito ver al médico del hotel.
cards.example_en: I have a high fever and a stomach ache, so I am sick and need to see the hotel doctor.
cards.mnemonic_en: I am sick, picture a patient in a hospital shouting 'Estoy enfermo' while clutching his stomach.

cards.definition_en: It is not functioning properly; it has been damaged.

examples.es: Intenté usar el candado de mi bolso, pero está roto.

examples.es: El quiosco de facturación no funciona porque está roto.
examples.en: The check-in kiosk is not working because it is broken.

examples.es: El calefactor de la habitación del hotel no se apaga; está roto.
examples.en: The heater in the hotel room won't turn off; it is broken.

cards.example_sentence: I tried to use the lock on my bag, but it is broken.
cards.example_es: Intenté usar el candado de mi bolso, pero está roto.
cards.example_en: I tried to use the lock on my bag, but it is broken.

cards.definition_en: A phrase indicating that something is not functioning or operating as intended.
collocations: It does not work for me

examples.es: La máquina de billetes tiene la pantalla negra. No funciona.
examples.en: The ticket machine has a black screen. It does not work.

examples.es: El aire acondicionado hace un ruido extraño. No funciona.
examples.en: The air conditioning makes a strange noise. It does not work.

cards.example_sentence: The ticket machine has a black screen. It does not work.

cards.example_en: The ticket machine has a black screen. It does not work.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a broken robot shouting No function, it does not work.

cards.definition_en: A polite request asking someone to say something again.
collocations: Can you repeat the last part?

examples.es: No escuché el número de la puerta de embarque. ¿Puede repetir?
examples.en: I didn't hear the boarding gate number. Can you repeat?

examples.es: La dirección del hotel es muy difícil de entender. ¿Puede repetir?
examples.en: The hotel address is very difficult to understand. Can you repeat?

examples.es: Disculpe, no entendí el precio total del boleto. ¿Puede repetir?
examples.en: Excuse me, I didn't understand the total ticket price. Can you repeat?

cards.example_sentence: I didn't hear the boarding gate number. Can you repeat?
cards.example_es: No escuché el número de la puerta de embarque. ¿Puede repetir?
cards.example_en: I didn't hear the boarding gate number. Can you repeat?
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a can shouting Can you repeat? to a parrot that answers repetir.

cards.definition_en: A polite request to reduce the speed.
collocations: Could you speak more slowly, please?
Could you explain more slowly, please?

examples.es: Lo siento, no entendí eso. Más despacio, por favor.
examples.en: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. More slowly, please.

examples.es: El taxi va demasiado rápido para que yo vea el hotel. Más despacio, por favor.
examples.en: The taxi is going too fast for me to see the hotel. More slowly, please.

examples.es: Estás hablando demasiado rápido para que yo pueda tomar notas. Más despacio, por favor.
examples.en: You are speaking too fast for me to take notes. More slowly, please.

cards.example_sentence: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. More slowly, please.
cards.example_es: Lo siento, no entendí eso. Más despacio, por favor.
cards.example_en: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. More slowly, please.
cards.mnemonic_en: A massive pushy robot crawls slower, politely saying please.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating lack of comprehension.
collocations: I do not understand what you mean
I do not understand the instructions
I do not understand the concept

examples.es: El camarero está hablando muy rápido en inglés y no entiendo.
examples.en: The waiter is speaking very fast in English and I do not understand.

examples.es: El horario del autobús es muy confuso, así que no entiendo.
examples.en: The bus schedule is very confusing, so I do not understand.

examples.es: Las instrucciones de la máquina son difíciles y no entiendo.
examples.en: The instructions on the machine are difficult and I do not understand.

cards.example_sentence: The waiter is speaking very fast in English and I do not understand.
cards.example_es: El camarero está hablando muy rápido en inglés y no entiendo.
cards.example_en: The waiter is speaking very fast in English and I do not understand.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a person shaking head saying no while saying I do not understand.

cards.definition_en: A question asking whether someone can speak English.

examples.es: Necesito ayuda con mi equipaje, pero no sé cómo pedirla en su idioma. ¿Habla inglés?
examples.en: I need help with my luggage, but I do not know how to ask in your language. Do you speak English?

examples.es: Estoy tratando de leer el horario del autobús, pero no está en mi idioma. ¿Habla inglés?
examples.en: I am trying to read the bus schedule, but it is not in my language. Do you speak English?

examples.es: No entiendo lo que dice el camarero en este restaurante. ¿Habla inglés?
examples.en: I do not understand what the waiter is saying in this restaurant. Do you speak English?

cards.example_sentence: I need help with my luggage, but I do not know how to ask in your language. Do you speak English?
cards.example_es: Necesito ayuda con mi equipaje, pero no sé cómo pedirla en su idioma. ¿Habla inglés?
cards.example_en: I need help with my luggage, but I do not know how to ask in your language. Do you speak English?
cards.mnemonic_en: A talking dog (habla) asks, Do you speak English?

cards.definition_en: A question asking for the location where water can be purchased.
collocations: Where can I buy water in the city?
Where can I buy water near me?
Where can I buy water at the store?

examples.es: Disculpe, tengo mucha sed antes de subir al tren, ¿dónde puedo comprar agua?
examples.en: Excuse me, I am very thirsty before getting on the train, where can I buy water?

examples.es: Se me acabó la botella mientras caminaba por el parque, ¿dónde puedo comprar agua?
examples.en: I ran out of bottles while walking through the park, where can I buy water?

examples.es: El agua del grifo del hotel no es potable, ¿dónde puedo comprar agua?
examples.en: The hotel tap water is not safe to drink, where can I buy water?

cards.example_sentence: Excuse me, I am very thirsty before getting on the train, where can I buy water?
cards.example_es: Disculpe, tengo mucha sed antes de subir al tren, ¿dónde puedo comprar agua?
cards.example_en: Excuse me, I am very thirsty before getting on the train, where can I buy water?
cards.mnemonic_en: A mafia don hands you water, so you know where to buy water.

cards.definition_en: A question asking for the duration of an event or process.
collocations: How long does it take to finish?
How long does it take to get there?
How long does it take to learn?

examples.es: ¿Cuánto tarda? Tengo un vuelo en dos horas.
examples.en: How long does it take? I have a flight in two hours.

examples.es: Quiero ir caminando al hotel. ¿Cuánto tarda?
examples.en: I want to walk to the hotel. How long does it take?

examples.es: El viaje en tren es muy largo. ¿Cuánto tarda?
examples.en: The train journey is very long. How long does it take?

cards.example_sentence: How long does it take? I have a flight in two hours.
cards.example_es: ¿Cuánto tarda? Tengo un vuelo en dos horas.
cards.example_en: How long does it take? I have a flight in two hours.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a tardy snail asking, How long does it take?

cards.definition_en: A question asking for the time at which something departs.
collocations: I need to know what time does it leave?

examples.en: I need to catch the last bus tonight. What time does it leave?

examples.es: Tengo un billete para el ferry. ¿A qué hora sale?
examples.en: I have a ticket for the ferry. What time does it leave?

examples.es: El avión está en la puerta de embarque. ¿A qué hora sale?
examples.en: The plane is at the gate. What time does it leave?

cards.example_sentence: I need to catch the last bus tonight. What time does it leave?
cards.example_es: Necesito tomar el último autobús de esta noche. ¿A qué hora sale?
cards.example_en: I need to catch the last bus tonight. What time does it leave?

cards.definition_en: A question asking for the time of arrival.
collocations: What time does it arrive at the station?

examples.es: Estoy esperando en la estación el tren de Barcelona. ¿A qué hora llega?

examples.es: Mi vuelo viene de Londres. ¿A qué hora llega?
examples.en: My flight is coming from London. What time does it arrive?

examples.es: Acabo de llamar a un taxi para llevarnos al aeropuerto. ¿A qué hora llega?
examples.en: I just called a taxi to take us to the airport. What time does it arrive?

cards.example_sentence: I am waiting at the station for the train from Barcelona. What time does it arrive?
cards.example_es: Estoy esperando en la estación el tren de Barcelona. ¿A qué hora llega?
cards.example_en: I am waiting at the station for the train from Barcelona. What time does it arrive?
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a clock shouting What time as a bus pulls up, reminding you of a qué hora llega.

cards.definition_en: A question asking whether a bathroom is available.

examples.en: I need to wash my hands before eating, is there a bathroom in this cafe?

examples.es: Mi hijo necesita usar el servicio con urgencia, ¿hay un baño en esta tienda?
examples.en: My son needs to use the toilet urgently, is there a bathroom in this store?

examples.es: Después de este viaje tan largo en autobús, ¿hay un baño en la terminal?

cards.example_sentence: I need to wash my hands before eating, is there a bathroom in this cafe?
cards.example_es: Tengo que lavarme las manos antes de comer, ¿hay un baño en este café?
cards.example_en: I need to wash my hands before eating, is there a bathroom in this cafe?

cards.definition_en: A question asking if card payment is accepted.
synonyms_en: Can I pay with a card?

examples.en: I don't have any cash for this taxi. Can I pay by card?

examples.es: Olvidé mi dinero en el hotel. ¿Puedo pagar con tarjeta?

cards.example_sentence: I don't have any cash for this taxi. Can I pay by card?
cards.example_es: No tengo efectivo para este taxi. ¿Puedo pagar con tarjeta?

cards.english: Do you have a room available?
cards.definition_en: A question asking whether a room is free for use.
collocations: Do you have a room available for tonight?
Do you have a room available for a short stay?
Do you have a room available for a conference?
Do you have a room available next week?

examples.es: Llegamos al motel después de medianoche y le preguntamos al recepcionista: '¿Tiene una habitación libre?'
examples.en: We arrived at the motel after midnight and asked the clerk, 'Do you have a room available?'

examples.es: No hice una reserva para esta noche, así que necesito saber: ¿Tiene una habitación libre?
examples.en: I didn't make a reservation for tonight, so I need to know: Do you have a room available?

examples.es: El cartel de afuera dice 'Habitaciones libres', así que preguntaré: ¿Tiene una habitación libre?

examples.es: Olvidé las llaves dentro y no pude abrir la puerta.
examples.en: I forgot my keys inside and could not open the door.

cards.example_sentence: I closed the door before leaving.
cards.example_es: Cerré la puerta antes de salir.
cards.example_en: I closed the door before leaving.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a door with a big sign that reads PUERTA.

cards.definition_en: A framed opening in a wall or building that lets in light and air, often fitted with glass.

examples.es: La ventana está abierta.
examples.en: The window is open.

examples.es: Cierra la ventana porque hace mucho frío afuera.
examples.en: Close the window because it is very cold outside.

examples.es: Ella mira a través de la ventana para ver quién llegó.
examples.en: She looks through the window to see who arrived.

cards.example_sentence: The window is open.
cards.example_es: La ventana está abierta.
cards.example_en: The window is open.
cards.mnemonic_en: A vent in the house opens a window, reminding me of the Spanish ventana.

cards.definition_en: A piece of furniture with a seat, back, and legs for one person to sit on.

examples.es: La silla está al lado de la mesa.
examples.en: The chair is next to the table.

examples.es: Me senté en la silla para ponerme los zapatos.
examples.en: I sat on the chair to put on my shoes.

examples.es: El niño arrastró la silla por toda la cocina.
examples.en: The boy dragged the chair across the kitchen.

cards.example_sentence: The chair is next to the table.
cards.example_es: La silla está al lado de la mesa.
cards.example_en: The chair is next to the table.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a giant silla turned into a comfy chair that you share with friends.

cards.definition_en: A piece of furniture with a flat top and legs, used for working, eating, or placing items.

examples.es: La mesa está cubierta de libros.
examples.en: The table is covered with books.

examples.es: Pon los platos sucios sobre la mesa después de cenar.
examples.en: Put the dirty dishes on the table after dinner.

examples.es: Limpiamos la mesa con un paño húmedo antes de comer.
examples.en: We clean the table with a damp cloth before eating.

cards.example_sentence: The table is covered with books.
cards.example_es: La mesa está cubierta de libros.
cards.example_en: The table is covered with books.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a Spanish mesa holding a dinner table of tacos.

cards.definition_en: Objects used to open locks or to operate a keyboard.

examples.es: No encuentro mis llaves, ¿las has visto?
examples.en: I can't find my keys, have you seen them?

examples.es: Deja las llaves sobre la mesa cuando entres a casa.
examples.en: Leave the keys on the table when you come home.

examples.es: Necesito un duplicado de las llaves para entrar al apartamento.
examples.en: I need a spare set of keys to enter the apartment.

cards.example_sentence: I can't find my keys, have you seen them?
cards.example_es: No encuentro mis llaves, ¿las has visto?
cards.example_en: I can't find my keys, have you seen them?
cards.mnemonic_en: She jingles the keys, tiny llaves, unlocking a bright treasure chest.

cards.definition_en: A device used for voice communication over distances.

examples.es: El teléfono está sonando en la mesa, ¿puedes contestar?
examples.en: The phone is ringing on the table, can you answer it?

examples.es: Mi teléfono no tiene batería, necesito cargarlo.
examples.en: My phone has no battery, I need to charge it.

examples.es: Necesito llamar a mi mamá, pero no encuentro mi teléfono en ningún lado de la casa.
examples.en: I need to call my mom, but I can't find my phone anywhere in the house.

cards.example_sentence: The phone is ringing on the table, can you answer it?
cards.example_es: El teléfono está sonando en la mesa, ¿puedes contestar?
cards.example_en: The phone is ringing on the table, can you answer it?
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a phone morphing into a huge teléfono with a bright pho label.

cards.definition_en: A device used to replenish the electrical power of a battery or other rechargeable device.

examples.es: ¿Dónde está el cargador de mi teléfono?
examples.en: Where is my phone's charger?

examples.es: Necesito el cargador porque mi teléfono solo tiene cinco por ciento de batería.
examples.en: I need the charger because my phone only has five percent battery left.

examples.es: Mi batería está por agotarse, ¿puedo tomar prestado tu cargador?
examples.en: My battery is about to die, can I borrow your charger?

cards.example_sentence: Where is my phone's charger?
cards.example_es: ¿Dónde está el cargador de mi teléfono?
cards.example_en: Where is my phone's charger?
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a charger loading a car, because charger sounds like Spanish cargar, to load.

cards.definition_en: Items worn to cover the body.

examples.es: Compré ropa nueva para el viaje.
examples.en: I bought new clothes for the trip.

examples.es: Tengo que lavar toda la ropa sucia este fin de semana.
examples.en: I have to wash all the dirty clothes this weekend.

examples.es: Ella guarda su ropa en el armario después de plancharla.
examples.en: She puts her clothes in the closet after ironing them.

cards.example_sentence: I bought new clothes for the trip.
cards.example_es: Compré ropa nueva para el viaje.
cards.example_en: I bought new clothes for the trip.
cards.mnemonic_en: I close the wardrobe door and pull out my bright ropa, the clothes I love.

cards.definition_en: Footwear that covers and protects the feet, typically consisting of a sole and a heel.

examples.es: Me compré unos zapatos nuevos para la boda.
examples.en: I bought new shoes for the wedding.

examples.es: Antes de entrar a la casa, siempre me quito los zapatos.
examples.en: Before entering the house, I always take off my shoes.

examples.es: Mis pies me duelen porque estos zapatos son muy pequeños.
examples.en: My feet hurt because these shoes are too small.

cards.example_sentence: I bought new shoes for the wedding.
cards.example_es: Me compré unos zapatos nuevos para la boda.
cards.example_en: I bought new shoes for the wedding.
cards.mnemonic_en: I zap my toes with shiny new shoes.

cards.definition_en: A piece of clothing worn on the feet, usually covering the ankle and sometimes extending up the leg.

examples.es: Mis calcetines están mojados después de la lluvia.
examples.en: My socks are wet after the rain.

examples.es: No encuentro el par de calcetines que combina con mis zapatos.
examples.en: I cannot find the pair of socks that matches my shoes.

examples.es: Debes ponerte calcetines antes de usar tus botas nuevas.
examples.en: You must put on socks before wearing your new boots.

cards.example_sentence: My socks are wet after the rain.
cards.example_es: Mis calcetines están mojados después de la lluvia.
cards.example_en: My socks are wet after the rain.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a sock hugging a calf—calcetín—so you remember socks.

cards.definition_en: A household appliance used to wash laundry.
collocations: wash clothes in the washing machine

examples.es: Compré una lavadora nueva porque la anterior se rompió.
examples.en: I bought a new washing machine because the old one broke.

examples.es: Tengo que sacar la ropa mojada de la lavadora para tenderla.
examples.en: I need to take the wet clothes out of the washing machine to hang them up.

examples.es: Pon el detergente en el compartimento de la lavadora antes de iniciar el ciclo.
examples.en: Put the detergent in the compartment of the washing machine before starting the cycle.

cards.example_sentence: I bought a new washing machine because the old one broke.
cards.example_es: Compré una lavadora nueva porque la anterior se rompió.
cards.example_en: I bought a new washing machine because the old one broke.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a lava flow spilling into a giant washing machine, turning the lava into clean clothes.

cards.definition_en: A piece of absorbent fabric used for drying or wiping something.

examples.es: Me sequé las manos con una toalla.
examples.en: I dried my hands with a towel.

examples.es: Colgué la toalla mojada en el baño para que se secara.
examples.en: I hung the wet towel in the bathroom to dry.

examples.es: Necesito una toalla limpia para salir de la ducha.
examples.en: I need a clean towel to get out of the shower.

cards.example_sentence: I dried my hands with a towel.
cards.example_es: Me sequé las manos con una toalla.
cards.example_en: I dried my hands with a towel.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a bright towel embroidered with TOALLA, soaking up water on the beach.

cards.definition_en: A cleansing substance, usually a solid or liquid, used for washing and removing dirt and oils.

examples.es: Compré jabón para lavar mis manos.
examples.en: I bought soap to wash my hands.

examples.es: Necesito más jabón porque la barra se está haciendo muy pequeña en la ducha.
examples.en: I need more soap because the bar is getting very small in the shower.

examples.es: El aroma del jabón dejó un olor fresco en toda la cocina después de limpiar los platos.
examples.en: The scent of the soap left a fresh smell throughout the kitchen after cleaning the dishes.

cards.example_sentence: I bought soap to wash my hands.
cards.example_es: Compré jabón para lavar mis manos.
cards.example_en: I bought soap to wash my hands.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a soap bar shouting ja‑bone while scrubbing away dirt.

cards.definition_en: A liquid soap used for cleaning hair.

examples.es: Compré un champú que deja el cabello muy suave.
examples.en: I bought a shampoo that makes the hair very soft.

examples.es: Se me terminó el champú mientras me estaba duchando.
examples.en: I ran out of shampoo while I was taking a shower.

examples.es: Necesito ir al supermercado a buscar más champú para lavarme la cabeza.
examples.en: I need to go to the supermarket to get more shampoo to wash my hair.

cards.example_sentence: I bought a shampoo that makes the hair very soft.
cards.example_es: Compré un champú que deja el cabello muy suave.
cards.example_en: I bought a shampoo that makes the hair very soft.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a sham poo being scrubbed with shampoo, linking Champú to the clean hair.

cards.definition_en: A tool with bristles used for cleaning, grooming, or applying substances.

examples.en: I need a brush to comb my hair.

examples.es: Usa el cepillo para limpiar el barro de tus botas.
examples.en: Use the brush to clean the mud off your boots.

examples.es: Ella compró un cepillo nuevo para lavar los platos.
examples.en: She bought a new brush to wash the dishes.

cards.example_sentence: I need a brush to comb my hair.
cards.example_es: Necesito un cepillo para peinar mi cabello.
cards.example_en: I need a brush to comb my hair.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a soft pillow named sep that you use as a hair brush.

cards.definition_en: A place or system where goods and services are bought and sold.

examples.es: Voy al mercado cada sábado para comprar frutas frescas.

examples.es: Los agricultores venden sus verduras recién cosechadas en el mercado del pueblo.
examples.en: The farmers sell their freshly harvested vegetables at the town market.

examples.es: Hay mucha gente buscando ofertas en el mercado durante la mañana.
examples.en: There are many people looking for deals at the market during the morning.

cards.example_sentence: I go to the market every Saturday to buy fresh fruit.
cards.example_es: Voy al mercado cada sábado para comprar frutas frescas.
cards.example_en: I go to the market every Saturday to buy fresh fruit.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a bustling market where vendors shout 'Mercado' while selling goods.

cards.definition_en: A place where goods are sold to the public.

examples.es: Ella trabaja en una tienda de ropa en el centro.
examples.en: She works at a clothing store downtown.

examples.es: El dueño cerró la tienda porque ya era muy tarde.
examples.en: The owner closed the store because it was very late.

cards.example_sentence: I am going to the store to buy bread.

cards.definition_en: A large self-service store that sells a wide variety of food and household items.

examples.en: I go to the supermarket to buy fruit.

examples.en: I forgot to buy milk at the supermarket.

examples.es: El supermercado está cerrado los domingos por la noche.
examples.en: The supermarket is closed on Sunday nights.

cards.example_sentence: I go to the supermarket to buy fruit.
cards.example_es: Voy al supermercado para comprar frutas.
cards.example_en: I go to the supermarket to buy fruit.

cards.definition_en: A written or printed list of items to be bought.

examples.en: I'm going to prepare the shopping list before going to the supermarket.

examples.es: Se me olvidó la lista de compras en la mesa de la cocina.
examples.en: I forgot the shopping list on the kitchen table.

examples.es: Mi esposo anotó todo lo que necesitamos en la lista de compras.
examples.en: My husband wrote down everything we need on the shopping list.

cards.example_sentence: I'm going to prepare the shopping list before going to the supermarket.
cards.example_es: Voy a preparar la lista de compras antes de ir al supermercado.
cards.example_en: I'm going to prepare the shopping list before going to the supermarket.
cards.mnemonic_en: I see a grocery list, a 'lista' of shopping items pinned on the fridge.

cards.definition_en: A small wheeled vehicle used for carrying goods, often pulled by a person or animal.

examples.es: Dejé mi carrito en la entrada mientras buscaba frutas frescas.

cards.example_sentence: I bought a cart to carry my groceries to the market.
cards.example_es: Compré un carrito para llevar mis compras al mercado.
cards.example_en: I bought a cart to carry my groceries to the market.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a tiny cart rolling like a little car carrito in a grocery aisle.

cards.definition_en: A checkout counter is a place in a store where customers pay for their purchases.

examples.es: Voy a la caja para pagar mis compras.
examples.en: I'm going to the checkout counter to pay for my purchases.

examples.es: El cliente dejó su tarjeta de crédito olvidada en la caja.
examples.en: The customer left his credit card behind at the checkout counter.

examples.es: Hay una fila muy larga esperando frente a la caja.
examples.en: There is a very long line waiting in front of the checkout counter.

cards.example_sentence: I'm going to the checkout counter to pay for my purchases.

cards.example_en: I'm going to the checkout counter to pay for my purchases.

cards.definition_en: Money in the form of bills and coins that is used for transactions.

examples.en: I prefer to pay in cash.

examples.es: El cajero no acepta tarjetas, solo efectivo.
examples.en: The cashier does not accept cards, only cash.

cards.example_sentence: I prefer to pay in cash.
cards.example_es: Prefiero pagar en efectivo.
cards.example_en: I prefer to pay in cash.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cash register flashing the word Efectivo on its screen.

cards.definition_en: A plastic or digital card issued by a financial institution that lets the holder borrow money to make purchases.

examples.es: Necesito solicitar una nueva tarjeta de crédito para mis compras en línea.
examples.en: I need to apply for a new credit card for my online purchases.

examples.es: El camarero me pidió mi tarjeta de crédito para pagar la cuenta del restaurante.
examples.en: The waiter asked for my credit card to pay the restaurant bill.

examples.es: Olvidé mi tarjeta de crédito en casa y no pude comprar el regalo.
examples.en: I left my credit card at home and could not buy the gift.

cards.example_sentence: I need to apply for a new credit card for my online purchases.
cards.example_es: Necesito solicitar una nueva tarjeta de crédito para mis compras en línea.
cards.example_en: I need to apply for a new credit card for my online purchases.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a credit card stamped with the word tarjeta, so credit equals tarjeta.

cards.definition_en: the act or result of making something different; a transformation or alteration

examples.es: Necesito un cambio de carrera.
examples.en: I need a career change.

examples.es: El cajero me dio el cambio incorrecto.
examples.en: The cashier gave me the wrong change.

examples.es: El clima tuvo un cambio repentino hoy.
examples.en: The weather had a sudden change today.

cards.example_sentence: I need a career change.
cards.example_es: Necesito un cambio de carrera.
cards.example_en: I need a career change.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cashier handing over a cambio of coins, instantly creating a fresh change.

cards.definition_en: A written acknowledgment that something has been received, often confirming a payment.
