examples.en: The receipt from the purchase is on the table.

examples.es: Guarda el recibo por si necesitas devolver los zapatos.
examples.en: Keep the receipt in case you need to return the shoes.

examples.es: El cajero me entregó el recibo después de pagar el café.
examples.en: The cashier handed me the receipt after I paid for the coffee.

cards.example_sentence: The receipt from the purchase is on the table.
cards.example_es: El recibo de la compra está sobre la mesa.
cards.example_en: The receipt from the purchase is on the table.
cards.mnemonic_en: I keep a receipt (recibo) in my wallet as proof.

cards.definition_en: Low in price; inexpensive.

examples.es: Este restaurante es muy barato.
examples.en: This restaurant is very cheap.

examples.es: Compré unos zapatos baratos en la tienda de la esquina.
examples.en: I bought some cheap shoes at the corner store.

examples.es: El billete de autobús es barato si lo compras con antelación.
examples.en: The bus ticket is cheap if you buy it in advance.

cards.example_sentence: This restaurant is very cheap.
cards.example_es: Este restaurante es muy barato.
cards.example_en: This restaurant is very cheap.
cards.mnemonic_en: A cheep bird perched on a cheap sign shouts Barato.

cards.definition_en: Costing a lot of money; having a high price.

examples.es: Ese coche es muy caro.
examples.en: That car is very expensive.

examples.es: No puedo comprar este reloj porque es demasiado caro.
examples.en: I cannot buy this watch because it is too expensive.

examples.es: El menú de este restaurante es muy caro para nosotros.
examples.en: The menu at this restaurant is very expensive for us.

cards.example_sentence: That car is very expensive.
cards.example_es: Ese coche es muy caro.
cards.example_en: That car is very expensive.
cards.mnemonic_en: A shiny car named Caro costs an expensive price.

cards.definition_en: A transaction in which goods or services are sold, often at a reduced price.

examples.es: Aprovecha la oferta de 50% de descuento en la tienda.
examples.en: Take advantage of the 50% off sale at the store.

examples.es: Compré este televisor porque estaba en oferta.
examples.en: I bought this television because it was on sale.

examples.es: Revisa el periódico para ver si hay alguna oferta en el supermercado.
examples.en: Check the newspaper to see if there is a sale at the supermarket.

cards.example_sentence: Take advantage of the 50% off sale at the store.
cards.example_es: Aprovecha la oferta de 50% de descuento en la tienda.
cards.example_en: Take advantage of the 50% off sale at the store.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a SALE banner with a loud Oferta shouted by a street vendor.

cards.definition_en: Not closed or blocked, allowing access or passage.

examples.es: El restaurante está abierto.
examples.en: The restaurant is open.

examples.es: Por favor, deja la ventana abierta para que entre aire fresco.
examples.en: Please leave the window open so fresh air can come in.

examples.es: La tienda de regalos siempre está abierta los fines de semana.
examples.en: The gift shop is always open on the weekends.

cards.example_sentence: The restaurant is open.
cards.example_es: El restaurante está abierto.
cards.example_en: The restaurant is open.
cards.mnemonic_en: Open the door and hear a crowd shout abierto as the light spills in

cards.definition_en: Not open; shut.

examples.es: El restaurante está cerrado.
examples.en: The restaurant is closed.

examples.es: La tienda de ropa permanece cerrada los domingos.
examples.en: The clothing store remains closed on Sundays.

examples.es: Por favor, asegúrate de que la puerta principal esté cerrada al salir.
examples.en: Please make sure the front door is closed when you leave.

cards.example_sentence: The restaurant is closed.
cards.example_es: El restaurante está cerrado.
cards.example_en: The restaurant is closed.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a closed door stamped with the word cerrado

cards.definition_en: A room or set of rooms where people work, especially in a business or organization.

examples.es: Trabajo en una oficina en el centro de la ciudad.
examples.en: I work in an office downtown.

examples.es: Dejé mis llaves olvidadas sobre el escritorio de la oficina.
examples.en: I left my keys on the desk at the office.

examples.es: Mi jefe me llamó para una reunión urgente en su oficina.
examples.en: My boss called me for an urgent meeting in his office.

cards.example_sentence: I work in an office downtown.
cards.example_es: Trabajo en una oficina en el centro de la ciudad.
cards.example_en: I work in an office downtown.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a busy office where every file is stamped with the word oficina.

cards.definition_en: A gathering of people for discussion or decision-making.

examples.es: La reunión comenzará a las diez de la mañana.
examples.en: The meeting will start at ten o'clock in the morning.

examples.es: Tengo una reunión importante con mi jefe en la oficina.
examples.en: I have an important meeting with my boss at the office.

examples.es: Por favor, no interrumpas la reunión mientras estamos hablando.
examples.en: Please do not interrupt the meeting while we are talking.

cards.example_sentence: The meeting will start at ten o'clock in the morning.
cards.example_es: La reunión comenzará a las diez de la mañana.
cards.example_en: The meeting will start at ten o'clock in the morning.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a meat‑ing where everyone reunites around a grill.

cards.definition_en: A person who works together with someone else in the same organization or on the same project.

examples.es: Mi compañero de trabajo me ayudó a terminar el informe.
examples.en: My coworker helped me finish the report.

examples.es: Voy a almorzar con mi compañero en la cafetería de la oficina.
examples.en: I am going to have lunch with my coworker at the office cafeteria.

examples.es: Le pedí a mi compañero que revisara los correos electrónicos antes de enviarlos.
examples.en: I asked my coworker to check the emails before sending them.

cards.example_sentence: My coworker helped me finish the report.
cards.example_es: Mi compañero de trabajo me ayudó a terminar el informe.
cards.example_en: My coworker helped me finish the report.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cow at a desk working with your compañero, the friendly coworker.

cards.definition_en: A person who is in charge of others, especially at work.

examples.es: Mi jefe me dio un aumento la semana pasada.
examples.en: My boss gave me a raise last week.

examples.es: El jefe revisó mi informe antes de la reunión importante.
examples.en: The boss reviewed my report before the important meeting.

examples.es: Mañana tengo una entrevista con mi nuevo jefe en la oficina.
examples.en: Tomorrow I have an interview with my new boss at the office.

cards.example_sentence: My boss gave me a raise last week.
cards.example_es: Mi jefe me dio un aumento la semana pasada.
cards.example_en: My boss gave me a raise last week.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine the jefe wearing a boss crown, shouting BOSS like a real boss.

cards.definition_en: A group of students who are taught together, or a category of objects or ideas that share common characteristics.

examples.es: La clase está cancelada hoy.
examples.en: The class is cancelled today.

examples.es: Llegué tarde a mi primera clase de la mañana.
examples.en: I arrived late to my first class of the morning.

examples.es: El profesor terminó la clase antes de tiempo.
examples.en: The teacher finished the class ahead of schedule.

cards.example_sentence: The class is cancelled today.
cards.example_es: La clase está cancelada hoy.
cards.example_en: The class is cancelled today.
cards.mnemonic_en: I picture a teacher ringing a bell for each class, shouting Clase to start the lesson.

cards.definition_en: School assignments given to be completed outside of class.

examples.es: Tengo que terminar mi tarea antes de la cena.
examples.en: I have to finish my homework before dinner.

examples.es: El profesor asignó mucha tarea para el fin de semana.
examples.en: The teacher assigned a lot of homework for the weekend.

examples.es: Mi hijo se sienta en la mesa de la cocina a hacer su tarea.
examples.en: My son sits at the kitchen table to do his homework.

cards.example_sentence: I have to finish my homework before dinner.
cards.example_es: Tengo que terminar mi tarea antes de la cena.
cards.example_en: I have to finish my homework before dinner.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a house (home) with a big 'tarea' sign on the door—homework.

cards.definition_en: To devote time and attention to acquiring knowledge or skill in a subject.

examples.es: Tengo que estudiar para el examen.
examples.en: I have to study for the exam.

examples.es: Voy a la biblioteca para estudiar en silencio.
examples.en: I go to the library to study in silence.

examples.es: Necesito estudiar mis notas antes de la reunión.
examples.en: I need to study my notes before the meeting.

cards.example_sentence: I have to study for the exam.
cards.example_es: Tengo que estudiar para el examen.
cards.example_en: I have to study for the exam.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a stew bubbling in a pot labeled Estudiar as you study.

cards.definition_en: To acquire knowledge or skill through study, experience, or instruction.

examples.es: Quiero aprender a tocar la guitarra.
examples.en: I want to learn to play the guitar.

examples.es: Los niños van a la escuela para aprender matemáticas.
examples.en: The children go to school to learn math.

examples.es: Es necesario practicar mucho para aprender un nuevo idioma.
examples.en: It is necessary to practice a lot to learn a new language.

cards.example_sentence: I want to learn to play the guitar.
cards.example_es: Quiero aprender a tocar la guitarra.
cards.example_en: I want to learn to play the guitar.
cards.mnemonic_en: I press the switch (prender) to learn the lesson.

cards.definition_en: A period of relaxation or inactivity intended to recover strength.

examples.es: Necesito descansar después del trabajo.
examples.en: I need to rest after work.

examples.es: Los médicos recomiendan descansar durante el fin de semana para recuperar energías.
examples.en: Doctors recommend to rest during the weekend to recover energy.

examples.es: Si te sientes mareado, es mejor sentarte y descansar un momento.
examples.en: If you feel dizzy, it is better to sit down and rest for a moment.

cards.example_sentence: I need to rest after work.
cards.example_es: Necesito descansar después del trabajo.
cards.example_en: I need to rest after work.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a weary traveler sitting on a rest bench called descANSAR for a quick rest

cards.definition_en: A plan that lists the times at which events or tasks are intended to occur.

examples.es: ¿Cuál es el horario de la reunión?
examples.en: What is the meeting schedule?

examples.es: El horario del autobús cambia los fines de semana.
examples.en: The bus schedule changes on weekends.

examples.es: Mi horario de trabajo es de nueve a cinco.
examples.en: My work schedule is from nine to five.

cards.example_sentence: What is the meeting schedule?
cards.example_es: ¿Cuál es el horario de la reunión?
cards.example_en: What is the meeting schedule?
cards.mnemonic_en: I picture a school board with the word horario, and the schedule (sked-ule) pinned beside it.

cards.definition_en: The current day; the day that is happening now.

examples.es: Hoy voy al mercado.
examples.en: Today I am going to the market.

examples.es: Tengo una cita médica muy importante hoy.
examples.en: I have a very important doctor's appointment today.

examples.es: El informe debe estar terminado hoy antes de las cinco.
examples.en: The report must be finished today before five o'clock.

cards.example_sentence: Today I am going to the market.
cards.example_es: Hoy voy al mercado.
cards.example_en: Today I am going to the market.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a bright toy today, saying 'hoy' as you hold it.

cards.definition_en: The day after today.

examples.es: Mañana iremos al parque.
examples.en: Tomorrow we will go to the park.

examples.es: Tengo una cita con el dentista mañana por la tarde.
examples.en: I have a dentist appointment tomorrow afternoon.

examples.es: No olvides terminar tu tarea para entregarla mañana.
examples.en: Do not forget to finish your homework to turn it in tomorrow.

cards.example_sentence: Tomorrow we will go to the park.
cards.example_es: Mañana iremos al parque.
cards.example_en: Tomorrow we will go to the park.
cards.mnemonic_en: Tomorrow I picture the sunrise and hear "mañana" whispering in my ear.

cards.definition_en: the day before today

examples.es: Ayer fuimos al cine y vimos una película de acción.
examples.en: Yesterday we went to the cinema and watched an action movie.

examples.es: Ayer terminé de leer el libro que me prestaste.
examples.en: Yesterday I finished reading the book you lent me.

examples.es: Ayer compré frutas frescas en el mercado local.
examples.en: Yesterday I bought fresh fruit at the local market.

cards.example_sentence: Yesterday we went to the cinema and watched an action movie.
cards.example_es: Ayer fuimos al cine y vimos una película de acción.
cards.example_en: Yesterday we went to the cinema and watched an action movie.
cards.mnemonic_en: Yesterday sounds like Spanish 'ayer', picture the day before today fading away.

cards.definition_en: the current week, referring to the seven-day period that includes today

examples.es: Esta semana tengo muchas reuniones importantes en la oficina.
examples.en: This week I have many important meetings at the office.

examples.es: Voy a visitar a mis abuelos esta semana para celebrar su aniversario.
examples.en: I am going to visit my grandparents this week to celebrate their anniversary.

examples.es: El supermercado tiene ofertas especiales esta semana en frutas y verduras.
examples.en: The supermarket has special offers this week on fruits and vegetables.

cards.example_sentence: This week I have many important meetings at the office.
cards.example_es: Esta semana tengo muchas reuniones importantes en la oficina.
cards.example_en: This week I have many important meetings at the office.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a calendar saying esta week on the page linking this week to Spanish esta semana

cards.definition_en: The period of Saturday and Sunday, or the days at the end of the week, when most people are not working.

examples.es: Este fin de semana voy a visitar a mis abuelos.
examples.en: This weekend I'm going to visit my grandparents.

examples.es: Me gusta descansar mucho durante el fin de semana.
examples.en: I like to rest a lot during the weekend.

examples.es: Mi jefe me envió un correo electrónico de trabajo durante el fin de semana.
examples.en: My boss sent me a work email during the weekend.

cards.example_sentence: This weekend I'm going to visit my grandparents.
cards.example_es: Este fin de semana voy a visitar a mis abuelos.
cards.example_en: This weekend I'm going to visit my grandparents.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture the week ending, a weekend, the fin of the week.

cards.definition_en: Moving or capable of moving at high speed.

examples.es: El guepardo es rápido cuando caza a su presa en la sabana.
examples.en: The cheetah is fast when it hunts its prey on the savanna.

examples.es: Necesito un internet rápido para trabajar desde casa.
examples.en: I need a fast internet connection to work from home.

examples.es: El atleta corre muy rápido en la pista.
examples.en: The athlete runs very fast on the track.

cards.example_sentence: The cheetah is fast when it hunts its prey on the savanna.
cards.example_es: El guepardo es rápido cuando caza a su presa en la sabana.
cards.example_en: The cheetah is fast when it hunts its prey on the savanna.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a rabbit saying rapido as it darts fast.

cards.definition_en: In a slow manner; at a low speed.

examples.es: Camina despacio para no resbalar.
examples.en: Walk slowly so you don't slip.

examples.es: El anciano sube las escaleras despacio porque le duelen las rodillas.
examples.en: The old man climbs the stairs slowly because his knees hurt.

examples.es: Por favor, habla despacio para que pueda entenderte mejor.
examples.en: Please speak slowly so that I can understand you better.

cards.example_sentence: Walk slowly so you don't slip.
cards.example_es: Camina despacio para no resbalar.
cards.example_en: Walk slowly so you don't slip.
cards.mnemonic_en: A snail whispers despacio as it slides, reminding you everything moves slowly.

cards.definition_en: A polite request to pause briefly.
collocations: Wait a moment while I check

examples.es: Espera un momento, voy a buscar la información.
examples.en: Wait a moment while I look up the information.

examples.es: El autobús está por llegar, espera un momento en la parada.
examples.en: The bus is about to arrive, so wait a moment at the stop.

examples.es: No cuelgues el teléfono, espera un momento mientras hablo con mi jefe.
examples.en: Do not hang up the phone, wait a moment while I speak with my boss.

cards.example_sentence: Wait a moment while I look up the information.
cards.example_es: Espera un momento, voy a buscar la información.
cards.example_en: Wait a moment while I look up the information.
cards.mnemonic_en: I wait hearing the Spanish espera echo in the quiet hallway

cards.definition_en: A polite phrase used to get someone's attention or to apologize for a minor offense.
collocations: Excuse me, could you repeat that?
Excuse me, I have a question
Excuse me, may I sit here?

examples.es: Perdón, ¿puedes pasarme la sal?
examples.en: Excuse me, can you pass me the salt?

examples.es: Perdón, ¿me dejas pasar para llegar a mi asiento?
examples.en: Excuse me, can I get past you to reach my seat?

examples.es: Perdón, ¿sabe usted a qué hora abre la biblioteca?
examples.en: Excuse me, do you know what time the library opens?

cards.example_sentence: Excuse me, can you pass me the salt?
cards.example_es: Perdón, ¿puedes pasarme la sal?
cards.example_en: Excuse me, can you pass me the salt?
cards.mnemonic_en: Excuse me, I'm a robot that says 'per‑done' when I apologize.

cards.definition_en: A polite response indicating that the speaker is happy to have helped.

examples.es: Muchas gracias por abrirme la puerta, de nada.
examples.en: Thank you for holding the door open for me, you are welcome.

examples.es: Muchas gracias por enseñarme el camino a la estación, de nada, ha sido un placer ayudarte.
examples.en: Thank you so much for showing me the way to the station, you are welcome, it was a pleasure to help you.

examples.es: Gracias por ayudarme con las bolsas del supermercado, de nada, no hay problema.
examples.en: Thanks for helping me with the grocery bags, you are welcome, no problem at all.

cards.example_sentence: Thank you for holding the door open for me, you are welcome.
cards.example_es: Muchas gracias por abrirme la puerta, de nada.
cards.example_en: Thank you for holding the door open for me, you are welcome.
cards.mnemonic_en: Hear 'De nada' and picture a door opening, saying 'You are welcome' to the visitor.

cards.definition_en: A casual way to say goodbye, indicating that you will meet again later.

examples.es: Ya me tengo que ir a casa, nos vemos luego.
examples.en: I have to head home now, see you later.

examples.es: Tengo que irme a trabajar, nos vemos luego.
examples.en: I have to go to work, see you later.

examples.es: Ya terminó la clase, nos vemos luego en la biblioteca.
examples.en: Class is over, see you later at the library.

cards.example_sentence: I have to head home now, see you later.
cards.example_es: Ya me tengo que ir a casa, nos vemos luego.
cards.example_en: I have to head home now, see you later.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a friend waving and shouting nos vemos, then you both smile and think see you later

cards.definition_en: A polite phrase used to wish someone a pleasant night, typically said when parting in the evening.

examples.es: Buenas noches, nos vemos mañana.
examples.en: Good night, see you tomorrow.

examples.es: Apaga la luz, buenas noches.
examples.en: Turn off the light, Good night.

examples.es: Le di un beso a mi hija y le dije buenas noches antes de dormir.
examples.en: I kissed my daughter and said Good night before she went to sleep.

cards.example_sentence: Good night, see you tomorrow.
cards.example_es: Buenas noches, nos vemos mañana.
cards.example_en: Good night, see you tomorrow.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a good night where 'buenas' sounds like good and 'noches' sounds like nights under a bright moon.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker feels the need to eat.

examples.es: Tengo hambre, así que voy a preparar un sándwich.
examples.en: I am hungry, so I am going to make a sandwich.

examples.es: Después de correr en el parque, tengo hambre y quiero cenar pronto.
examples.en: After running in the park, I am hungry and want to eat dinner soon.

examples.es: No he almorzado nada hoy y tengo hambre, ¿podemos ir a un restaurante?
examples.en: I have not had lunch today and I am hungry, can we go to a restaurant?

cards.example_sentence: I am hungry, so I am going to make a sandwich.
cards.example_es: Tengo hambre, así que voy a preparar un sándwich.
cards.example_en: I am hungry, so I am going to make a sandwich.
cards.mnemonic_en: I am hungry, I picture a giant hamburger satisfying my hambre.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker feels drowsy.

examples.es: Tengo sueño después de trabajar todo el día.
examples.en: I am sleepy after working all day.

examples.es: Apaga la luz, por favor, porque tengo sueño.
examples.en: Turn off the light, please, because I am sleepy.

examples.es: Bostecé tres veces durante la película porque tengo sueño.
examples.en: I yawned three times during the movie because I am sleepy.

cards.example_sentence: I am sleepy after working all day.
cards.example_es: Tengo sueño después de trabajar todo el día.
cards.example_en: I am sleepy after working all day.
cards.mnemonic_en: I am sleepy like a tired llama whispering 'tengo sueño'.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker feels cold.
collocations: I am cold, can you close the window?
I am cold and need a sweater

examples.es: Tengo frío, así que me pondré una chaqueta.
examples.en: I am cold, so I will put on a jacket.

examples.es: Cierra la ventana porque tengo frío.
examples.en: Close the window because I am cold.

examples.es: Apaga el aire acondicionado, tengo frío.
examples.en: Turn off the air conditioning, I am cold.

cards.example_sentence: I am cold, so I will put on a jacket.
cards.example_es: Tengo frío, así que me pondré una chaqueta.
cards.example_en: I am cold, so I will put on a jacket.
cards.mnemonic_en: I shiver, thinking 'tengo frío' like a frozen ego wearing a coat.

cards.definition_en: Used to say that you feel warm or have a high body temperature.
collocations: I am hot after the workout

examples.es: Tengo calor, así que voy a abrir la ventana.
examples.en: I am hot, so I am going to open the window.

examples.es: Apaga la calefacción porque tengo calor en esta habitación.
examples.en: Turn off the heater because I am hot in this room.

examples.es: Por favor, enciende el ventilador porque tengo calor.
examples.en: Please turn on the fan because I am hot.

cards.example_sentence: I am hot, so I am going to open the window.
cards.example_es: Tengo calor, así que voy a abrir la ventana.
cards.example_en: I am hot, so I am going to open the window.
cards.mnemonic_en: I am hot, like a blazing 'calor' flame scorching the desert.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker feels fatigue.

examples.es: Estoy cansado después de correr cinco kilómetros.
examples.en: I am tired after running five kilometers.

examples.es: No puedo seguir trabajando porque estoy cansado.
examples.en: I cannot keep working because I am tired.

examples.es: Aunque dormí ocho horas, todavía estoy cansado.
examples.en: Even though I slept for eight hours, I am tired.

cards.example_sentence: I am tired after running five kilometers.
cards.example_es: Estoy cansado después de correr cinco kilómetros.
cards.example_en: I am tired after running five kilometers.
cards.mnemonic_en: I am tired and open a sad empty can, feeling cansado

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that someone is occupied or has no free time.

examples.es: Estoy ocupado ahora, pero te llamaré más tarde.
examples.en: I am busy right now, but I will call you later.

examples.es: No puedo ir al cine porque estoy ocupado con mi tarea.
examples.en: I cannot go to the movies because I am busy with my homework.

examples.es: Por favor, no me molestes mientras estoy ocupado trabajando.
examples.en: Please do not disturb me while I am busy working.

cards.example_sentence: I am busy right now, but I will call you later.
cards.example_es: Estoy ocupado ahora, pero te llamaré más tarde.
cards.example_en: I am busy right now, but I will call you later.
cards.mnemonic_en: I picture a crowded desk, shouting Estoy ocupado as I juggle papers.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that one is not occupied or constrained.

examples.es: Estoy libre este fin de semana para salir.
examples.en: I am free this weekend to go out.

examples.es: Si termino mi trabajo temprano, estoy libre para ayudarte con la mudanza.
examples.en: If I finish my work early, I am free to help you with the move.

examples.es: Dime a qué hora estás disponible porque hoy estoy libre toda la tarde.
examples.en: Tell me what time you are available because I am free all afternoon today.

cards.example_sentence: I am free this weekend to go out.
cards.example_es: Estoy libre este fin de semana para salir.
cards.example_en: I am free this weekend to go out.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a free bird shouting Libre as it flies.

cards.definition_en: A command telling someone to remain in this place.

examples.es: Quédate aquí mientras preparo la cena.
examples.en: Stay here while I prepare dinner.

examples.es: El guía turístico nos dijo: Quédate aquí hasta que regrese con las entradas.
examples.en: The tour guide told us: Stay here until I return with the tickets.

examples.es: Si te sientes mareado, por favor, quédate aquí sentado en la silla.
examples.en: If you feel dizzy, please, Stay here sitting in the chair.

cards.example_sentence: Stay here while I prepare dinner.
cards.example_es: Quédate aquí mientras preparo la cena.
cards.example_en: Stay here while I prepare dinner.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a sign that says Stay here while hearing quédate aquí sounding like stay‑date.

cards.definition_en: A command telling someone to approach the speaker.

examples.es: Cuando el perro se escapó, el dueño gritó: "¡Ven aquí!"
examples.en: When the dog ran away, the owner shouted, "Come here!"

examples.es: La profesora señaló el pupitre vacío y le dijo al alumno: "Ven aquí, por favor".
examples.en: The teacher pointed to the empty desk and told the student, "Come here, please."

examples.es: Mi madre me vio desde la cocina y me hizo señas diciendo: "Ven aquí para ayudarme con la cena".
examples.en: My mother saw me from the kitchen and signaled, "Come here to help me with dinner."

cards.example_sentence: When the dog ran away, the owner shouted, "Come here!"
cards.example_es: Cuando el perro se escapó, el dueño gritó: "¡Ven aquí!"
cards.example_en: When the dog ran away, the owner shouted, "Come here!"
cards.mnemonic_en: A dove says come here when you hear Ven aquí

cards.definition_en: To take a seat.

examples.es: Siéntate en la silla y espera.
examples.en: Sit down on the chair and wait.

examples.es: Siéntate aquí para que podamos hablar del proyecto.
examples.en: Sit down here so we can talk about the project.

examples.es: Siéntate frente al escritorio para empezar a escribir la carta.
examples.en: Sit down in front of the desk to start writing the letter.

cards.example_sentence: Sit down on the chair and wait.
cards.example_es: Siéntate en la silla y espera.
cards.example_en: Sit down on the chair and wait.
cards.mnemonic_en: Sit down as the chair whispers siéntate, inviting you to rest.

cards.definition_en: To rise to a standing position.

examples.es: Por favor, levántate de la silla para saludar a nuestra visita.
examples.en: Please stand up from the chair to greet our guest.

examples.es: Si quieres ver mejor el desfile, levántate de tu asiento.
examples.en: If you want to see the parade better, stand up from your seat.

examples.es: Cuando el himno nacional comience a sonar, levántate por respeto.
examples.en: When the national anthem starts playing, stand up out of respect.

cards.example_sentence: Please stand up from the chair to greet our guest.
cards.example_es: Por favor, levántate de la silla para saludar a nuestra visita.
cards.example_en: Please stand up from the chair to greet our guest.
cards.mnemonic_en: Stand up as if pulling a lever that says levanta to lift yourself

cards.definition_en: A command telling someone to open the door.

examples.es: Abre la puerta antes de que lleguen los invitados.
examples.en: Open the door before the guests arrive.

examples.es: Si tienes las manos ocupadas con las bolsas, abre la puerta con el codo.
examples.en: If your hands are full with the bags, open the door with your elbow.

examples.es: Por favor, abre la puerta para que el perro pueda salir al jardín.
examples.en: Please open the door so the dog can go out to the garden.

cards.example_sentence: Open the door before the guests arrive.
cards.example_es: Abre la puerta antes de que lleguen los invitados.
cards.example_en: Open the door before the guests arrive.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a hand shouting abre as it opens the bright red door

cards.definition_en: A command telling someone to shut the window.
collocations: Make sure to close the window
Don't forget to close the window

examples.es: Cierra la ventana, por favor.
examples.en: Close the window, please.

examples.es: Hace mucho frío afuera, así que cierra la ventana.
examples.en: It is very cold outside, so close the window.

examples.es: Para evitar que entre el ruido de la calle, cierra la ventana.
examples.en: To keep out the street noise, close the window.

cards.example_sentence: Close the window, please.
cards.example_es: Cierra la ventana, por favor.
cards.example_en: Close the window, please.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a saw (cierra) chopping the window closed.

cards.definition_en: To activate the light by switching it on.

examples.es: No veo nada en este pasillo, enciende la luz para que podamos caminar.
examples.en: I cannot see anything in this hallway, turn on the light so we can walk.

examples.es: Está muy oscuro aquí, enciende la luz para ver mejor.
examples.en: It is very dark in here, turn on the light to see better.

examples.es: Cuando entres en la habitación, enciende la luz.
examples.en: When you enter the room, turn on the light.

cards.example_sentence: I cannot see anything in this hallway, turn on the light so we can walk.
cards.example_es: No veo nada en este pasillo, enciende la luz para que podamos caminar.
cards.example_en: I cannot see anything in this hallway, turn on the light so we can walk.
cards.mnemonic_en: Flip the switch and shout 'luz' as the room brightens.

cards.definition_en: A command telling someone to switch the light off.
collocations: turn off the light before bed

examples.es: Por favor, apaga la luz cuando salgas de la habitación.
examples.en: Please turn off the light when you leave the room.

examples.es: Antes de irte a dormir, apaga la luz de la mesita de noche.
examples.en: Before you go to sleep, turn off the light on the nightstand.

examples.es: Si eres la última persona en salir de la oficina, apaga la luz del pasillo.
examples.en: If you are the last person to leave the office, turn off the light in the hallway.

cards.example_sentence: Please turn off the light when you leave the room.
cards.example_es: Por favor, apaga la luz cuando salgas de la habitación.
cards.example_en: Please turn off the light when you leave the room.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a torn-off lamp whispering apaga la luz as you turn off the light.

cards.definition_en: To clean the clothing by using water and detergent.
collocations: wash the clothes in cold water

examples.es: Lava la ropa antes de que empiece a llover.
examples.en: Wash the clothes before it starts to rain.

examples.es: Si la camisa está sucia, lava la ropa hoy mismo.
examples.en: If the shirt is dirty, wash the clothes today.

examples.es: Usa detergente cuando lava la ropa en la lavadora.
examples.en: Use detergent when you wash the clothes in the machine.

cards.example_sentence: Wash the clothes before it starts to rain.
cards.example_es: Lava la ropa antes de que empiece a llover.
cards.example_en: Wash the clothes before it starts to rain.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture lava bubbling as it washes the clothes.

cards.definition_en: To remove the garbage from a location and place it in a waste container or outside for collection.
collocations: take out the trash before dinner

examples.es: Saca la basura antes de que lleguen los invitados.
examples.en: Take out the trash before the guests arrive.

examples.es: Por favor, saca la basura al contenedor de la calle esta noche.
examples.en: Please take out the trash to the street bin tonight.

examples.es: Si la cocina huele mal, saca la basura inmediatamente.
examples.en: If the kitchen smells bad, take out the trash immediately.

cards.example_sentence: Take out the trash before the guests arrive.
cards.example_es: Saca la basura antes de que lleguen los invitados.
cards.example_en: Take out the trash before the guests arrive.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a taco taking out trash from the bin

cards.definition_en: To purchase groceries or other needed items.

examples.es: Mañana haz la compra de los alimentos que necesitamos.
examples.en: Tomorrow, do the shopping for the food we need.

examples.es: Por favor, haz la compra antes de que cierren el supermercado.
examples.en: Please, do the shopping before the supermarket closes.

examples.es: Si no tienes nada en la nevera, haz la compra hoy mismo.
examples.en: If you have nothing in the fridge, do the shopping today.

cards.example_sentence: Tomorrow, do the shopping for the food we need.
cards.example_es: Mañana haz la compra de los alimentos que necesitamos.
cards.example_en: Tomorrow, do the shopping for the food we need.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a hazy llama pushing a cart, doing the shopping.

cards.english: I am going to the bank
cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker is traveling to the bank.
collocations: I'm going to the bank tomorrow
I'm going to the bank later today
I'm going to the bank to deposit some money
I'm going to the bank for a loan
synonyms_en: on my way to the bank

examples.es: Tengo que retirar dinero para el viaje, así que voy al banco ahora mismo.
examples.en: I have to withdraw money for the trip, so I am going to the bank right now.

examples.es: Como necesito dinero en efectivo, voy al banco.
examples.en: Since I need some cash, I am going to the bank.

examples.es: Voy al banco a abrir una cuenta de ahorros nueva.
examples.en: I am going to the bank to open a new savings account.

cards.example_sentence: I have to withdraw money for the trip, so I am going to the bank right now.
cards.example_es: Tengo que retirar dinero para el viaje, así que voy al banco ahora mismo.
cards.example_en: I have to withdraw money for the trip, so I am going to the bank right now.
cards.mnemonic_en: I walk to the bank, picturing a wooden banco bench waiting for me.

cards.english: I am going to the pharmacy
cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker is heading to the pharmacy.
synonyms_en: I'm on my way to the pharmacy

examples.es: Tengo dolor de cabeza, así que voy a la farmacia.
examples.en: I have a headache, so I am going to the pharmacy.

examples.es: Necesito comprar medicina para mi resfriado, así que voy a la farmacia.
examples.en: I need to buy medicine for my cold, so I am going to the pharmacy.

examples.es: Como se me acabó el champú, voy a la farmacia ahora mismo.
examples.en: Since I ran out of shampoo, I am going to the pharmacy right now.

cards.example_sentence: I have a headache, so I am going to the pharmacy.
cards.example_es: Tengo dolor de cabeza, así que voy a la farmacia.
cards.example_en: I have a headache, so I am going to the pharmacy.
cards.mnemonic_en: I’m going to the pharmacy, a voy (voyage) to the farm of medicines.

cards.english: I am going to the gym
cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker is heading to the gym.

examples.es: Voy al gimnasio todos los días para mantenerme en forma.
examples.en: I am going to the gym every day to stay fit.

examples.es: Como tengo mucha energía esta tarde, voy al gimnasio a levantar pesas.
examples.en: Since I have a lot of energy this afternoon, I am going to the gym to lift weights.

examples.es: Después de terminar mi jornada laboral, voy al gimnasio para correr en la cinta.
examples.en: After finishing my workday, I am going to the gym to run on the treadmill.

cards.example_sentence: I am going to the gym every day to stay fit.
cards.example_es: Voy al gimnasio todos los días para mantenerme en forma.
cards.example_en: I am going to the gym every day to stay fit.
cards.mnemonic_en: I picture myself walking into the gym, hearing the Spanish word 'gimnasio' echoing in the hallway.

cards.definition_en: To travel by riding a bus.
collocations: take the bus instead of driving

examples.es: Cada mañana, él decide tomar el autobús para ir a su oficina.
examples.en: Every morning, he decides to take the bus to go to his office.

examples.es: Si no tienes coche, lo más rápido es tomar el autobús para llegar a tiempo.
examples.en: If you do not have a car, the fastest way is to take the bus to arrive on time.

examples.es: Para ahorrar dinero en gasolina, prefiero tomar el autobús todos los días.
examples.en: To save money on gas, I prefer to take the bus every day.

cards.example_sentence: Every morning, he decides to take the bus to go to his office.
cards.example_es: Cada mañana, él decide tomar el autobús para ir a su oficina.
cards.example_en: Every morning, he decides to take the bus to go to his office.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture Tom a bus driver waving, saying Take the bus.

cards.definition_en: A directive telling someone to stay until the train arrives.
collocations: wait for the train to arrive
wait for the train at the platform
wait for the train on time

examples.es: Espera el tren en el andén número cuatro.
examples.en: Wait for the train on platform number four.

examples.es: Si llegas temprano, espera el tren sentado en el banco.
examples.en: If you arrive early, wait for the train sitting on the bench.

examples.es: No te vayas todavía, espera el tren que llega a las diez.
examples.en: Do not leave yet, wait for the train that arrives at ten.

cards.example_sentence: Wait for the train on platform number four.
cards.example_es: Espera el tren en el andén número cuatro.
cards.example_en: Wait for the train on platform number four.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an esper wizard waiting for the train.

cards.definition_en: A command telling someone to telephone their mother.
main_translations_es: Haz una llamada a tu madre
collocations: Don't forget to call your mother
Make sure you call your mother
I need to call my mother
She told me to call your mother

examples.es: Llama a tu madre cuando llegues a casa.
examples.en: Call your mother when you get home.

examples.es: Llama a tu madre para avisarle que el vuelo se retrasó.
examples.en: Call your mother to let her know the flight was delayed.

examples.es: Llama a tu madre antes de que empiece la cena de cumpleaños.
examples.en: Call your mother before the birthday dinner starts.

cards.example_sentence: Call your mother when you get home.
cards.example_es: Llama a tu madre cuando llegues a casa.
cards.example_en: Call your mother when you get home.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine calling a llama and telling it call your mother

cards.definition_en: To transmit a written or electronic communication to someone.

examples.es: Envía un mensaje a tu amigo cuando llegues.
examples.en: Send a message to your friend when you arrive.

examples.es: Si necesitas ayuda urgente, envía un mensaje al grupo de trabajo.
examples.en: If you need urgent help, send a message to the work group.

examples.es: Por favor, envía un mensaje para confirmar tu asistencia a la fiesta.
examples.en: Please send a message to confirm your attendance at the party.

cards.example_sentence: Send a message to your friend when you arrive.
cards.example_es: Envía un mensaje a tu amigo cuando llegues.
cards.example_en: Send a message to your friend when you arrive.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a courier handing over a note that says SEND like a Spanish envía sign

cards.definition_en: To look at or retrieve the email messages.

examples.es: Revisa el correo antes de salir.
examples.en: Check the mail before you leave.

examples.es: Por favor, revisa el correo cuando llegues a casa del trabajo.
examples.en: Please check the mail when you get home from work.

examples.es: Si esperas una carta importante, deberías revisar el correo en cuanto llegues a casa.
examples.en: If you are expecting an important letter, you should check the mail as soon as you get home.

cards.example_sentence: Check the mail before you leave.
cards.example_es: Revisa el correo antes de salir.
cards.example_en: Check the mail before you leave.
cards.mnemonic_en: Check the mail, just like you 'chequeas' the inbox in Spanish.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker requires rest.
collocations: I need to rest and recover
I need to rest for a while
I need to rest after work

examples.es: Necesito descansar después de tanto trabajo.
examples.en: I need to rest after so much work.

examples.es: Estoy muy cansado y necesito descansar antes de seguir conduciendo.
examples.en: I am very tired and I need to rest before I continue driving.

examples.es: El médico me dijo que necesito descansar durante todo el fin de semana.
examples.en: The doctor told me that I need to rest throughout the entire weekend.

cards.example_sentence: I need to rest after so much work.
cards.example_es: Necesito descansar después de tanto trabajo.
cards.example_en: I need to rest after so much work.
cards.mnemonic_en: I picture a tired llama needing a rest, whispering 'descansar' as it naps.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that someone needs to act quickly because they have limited time.

examples.es: Tengo prisa, así que no puedo quedarme mucho tiempo.
examples.en: I am in a hurry, so I can't stay long.

examples.es: Por favor, conduce más rápido porque tengo prisa para llegar a la reunión.
examples.en: Please drive faster because I am in a hurry to get to the meeting.

examples.es: No puedo hablar ahora porque tengo prisa por tomar el autobús.
examples.en: I cannot talk now because I am in a hurry to catch the bus.

cards.example_sentence: I am in a hurry, so I can't stay long.
cards.example_es: Tengo prisa, así que no puedo quedarme mucho tiempo.
cards.example_en: I am in a hurry, so I can't stay long.
cards.mnemonic_en: I am in a hurry, chasing a prize‑a rabbit.

cards.definition_en: A casual way of saying that something is not an issue or that you are happy to help.

examples.es: No pasa nada, podemos intentarlo de nuevo.
examples.en: No problem, we can try again.

examples.es: Se me olvidó comprar la leche, pero no pasa nada, iré a la tienda más tarde.
examples.en: I forgot to buy the milk, but no problem, I will go to the store later.

examples.es: Perdón por llegar tarde a la reunión, no pasa nada, acabamos de empezar.
examples.en: Sorry for being late to the meeting, no problem, we just started.

cards.example_sentence: No problem, we can try again.
cards.example_es: No pasa nada, podemos intentarlo de nuevo.
cards.example_en: No problem, we can try again.
cards.mnemonic_en: No problem—no pasa nada, nothing passes by.

cards.definition_en: A person who lives near or next to another person.

examples.es: Mi vecino me ayudó a cargar las cajas.
examples.en: My neighbor helped me carry the boxes.

examples.es: El vecino siempre saca a pasear a su perro por la mañana.
examples.en: The neighbor always takes his dog for a walk in the morning.

examples.es: Le pedí una taza de azúcar a mi vecino porque se me había terminado.
examples.en: I asked my neighbor for a cup of sugar because I had run out.

cards.example_sentence: My neighbor helped me carry the boxes.
cards.example_es: Mi vecino me ayudó a cargar las cajas.
cards.example_en: My neighbor helped me carry the boxes.
cards.mnemonic_en: I see my neighbor waving a big ve sign, echoing the Spanish vecino.

cards.definition_en: A public area of land with grass, trees, and facilities for recreation and leisure.

examples.es: Vamos al parque a jugar al fútbol.
examples.en: We go to the park to play soccer.

examples.es: Los niños corren y se divierten mucho en el parque.
examples.en: The children run and have a lot of fun at the park.

examples.es: Saqué a pasear a mi perro por el parque esta mañana.
examples.en: I took my dog for a walk through the park this morning.

cards.example_sentence: We go to the park to play soccer.
cards.example_es: Vamos al parque a jugar al fútbol.
cards.example_en: We go to the park to play soccer.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a park with a long queue of ducks waiting for bread.

title: English Basics
description: Everyday words and short expressions for beginners.

cards.definition_en: A word used when meeting someone or starting a conversation.

examples.es: Hola, ¿cómo estás?
examples.en: Hello, how are you?

examples.es: ¡Hola! Buenos días, ¿cómo ha amanecido usted?
examples.en: Hello! Good morning, how are you doing today?

examples.es: Hola, mucho gusto en conocerte.
examples.en: Hello, nice to meet you.

cards.example_sentence: Hello, how are you?
cards.example_es: Hola, ¿cómo estás?
cards.example_en: Hello, how are you?

cards.definition_en: A polite expression used to show gratitude.

examples.es: Gracias por tu ayuda.
examples.en: Thank you for your help.

examples.es: Gracias por el regalo de cumpleaños.
examples.en: Thank you for the birthday present.

examples.es: Gracias por invitarme a cenar esta noche.
examples.en: Thank you for inviting me to dinner tonight.

cards.example_sentence: Thank you for your help.
cards.example_es: Gracias por tu ayuda.
cards.example_en: Thank you for your help.

cards.definition_en: A polite word used when asking for something or making a request.
synonyms_en: if you would be so kind

examples.es: Por favor, abre la puerta.
examples.en: Please open the door.

examples.es: Pásame la sal, por favor.
examples.en: Pass me the salt, please.

examples.es: Por favor, siéntate en esa silla.
examples.en: Please sit in that chair.

cards.example_sentence: Please open the door.
cards.example_es: Por favor, abre la puerta.
cards.example_en: Please open the door.

cards.definition_en: A greeting used in the early part of the day.

examples.es: Buenos días, profesora.
examples.en: Good morning, teacher.

examples.es: Buenos días, ¿cómo has dormido?
examples.en: Good morning, how did you sleep?

examples.es: Al entrar en la cafetería, el camarero nos dijo: Buenos días.
examples.en: When we entered the cafe, the waiter said to us: Good morning.

cards.example_sentence: Good morning, teacher.
cards.example_es: Buenos días, profesora.
cards.example_en: Good morning, teacher.

cards.definition_en: A question used to ask for the price of something.

examples.es: Me gusta esta camisa, ¿cuánto cuesta?
examples.en: I like this shirt, how much does it cost?

examples.es: Voy a comprar manzanas, ¿cuánto cuesta el kilo?
examples.en: I am going to buy apples, how much does it cost per kilo?

examples.es: El boleto para el cine es caro, ¿cuánto cuesta?
examples.en: The movie ticket is expensive, how much does it cost?

cards.example_sentence: I like this shirt, how much does it cost?
cards.example_es: Me gusta esta camisa, ¿cuánto cuesta?
cards.example_en: I like this shirt, how much does it cost?

cards.definition_en: A word used to express farewell.

examples.es: Adiós, nos vemos mañana.
examples.en: Goodbye, see you tomorrow.

examples.es: Le dije adiós a mi madre antes de subir al autobús.
examples.en: I said Goodbye to my mother before getting on the bus.

examples.es: Es hora de irse, así que adiós a todos.
examples.en: It is time to leave, so Goodbye to everyone.

cards.example_sentence: Goodbye, see you tomorrow.
cards.example_es: Adiós, nos vemos mañana.
cards.example_en: Goodbye, see you tomorrow.
cards.mnemonic_en: I wave goodbye and shout adiós as the ship sails away.

cards.definition_en: A polite greeting used in the early afternoon.

examples.es: Buenas tardes, ¿cómo está usted?
examples.en: Good afternoon, how are you?

examples.es: El profesor entró al salón y dijo: Buenas tardes a todos los alumnos.
examples.en: The teacher walked into the classroom and said: Good afternoon to all the students.

examples.es: Al llegar a la oficina después de comer, siempre saludo diciendo: Buenas tardes.
examples.en: When I arrive at the office after lunch, I always greet people by saying: Good afternoon.

cards.example_sentence: Good afternoon, how are you?
cards.example_es: Buenas tardes, ¿cómo está usted?
cards.example_en: Good afternoon, how are you?
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a good (buenas) tardy (tardes) afternoon sipping coffee.

cards.definition_en: A polite greeting used in the early part of the night.

examples.es: Buenas noches, ¿cómo estuvo tu día?
examples.en: Good evening, how was your day?

examples.es: Al entrar al restaurante, el mesero nos dijo: Buenas noches.
examples.en: When we entered the restaurant, the waiter said to us: Good evening.

examples.es: Al ver a mis vecinos en el pasillo a las siete de la tarde, les dije: Buenas noches.
examples.en: When I saw my neighbors in the hallway at seven in the evening, I said to them: Good evening.

cards.example_sentence: Good evening, how was your day?
cards.example_es: Buenas noches, ¿cómo estuvo tu día?
cards.example_en: Good evening, how was your day?
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a good night, because Good evening sounds like 'Buenas noches' under a bright moon.

cards.definition_en: A polite way to ask someone about their well-being.

examples.es: Hola, hace mucho que no nos vemos, ¿cómo estás?
examples.en: Hello, I haven't seen you in a long time, how are you?

examples.es: Te noto un poco triste hoy, ¿cómo estás?
examples.en: You seem a bit sad today, how are you?

examples.es: Entro a la oficina y saludo a mi jefe: ¿cómo estás?
examples.en: I walk into the office and greet my boss: how are you?

cards.example_sentence: Hello, I haven't seen you in a long time, how are you?
cards.example_es: Hola, hace mucho que no nos vemos, ¿cómo estás?
cards.example_en: Hello, I haven't seen you in a long time, how are you?
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a coma patient asking How are you?

cards.definition_en: A polite response indicating that one is doing well.

examples.es: Estoy bien, gracias por preguntar.
examples.en: I am fine, thanks for asking.

examples.es: No te preocupes por mí, estoy bien.
examples.en: Don't worry about me, I am fine.

examples.es: Aunque tuve un día largo, estoy bien.
examples.en: Even though I had a long day, I am fine.

cards.example_sentence: I am fine, thanks for asking.
cards.example_es: Estoy bien, gracias por preguntar.
cards.example_en: I am fine, thanks for asking.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a fine wine labeled bien, reminding you I am fine

cards.definition_en: An affirmative response used to indicate agreement or confirmation.

examples.es: ¿Quieres ir al cine conmigo? Sí, me encantaría ir.
examples.en: Do you want to go to the movies with me? Yes, I would love to go.

examples.es: ¿Es esta tu mochila? Sí, es mía.
examples.en: Is this your backpack? Yes, it is mine.

examples.es: ¿Vas a terminar tu tarea hoy? Sí, la terminaré antes de cenar.
examples.en: Are you going to finish your homework today? Yes, I will finish it before dinner.

cards.example_sentence: Do you want to go to the movies with me? Yes, I would love to go.
cards.example_es: ¿Quieres ir al cine conmigo? Sí, me encantaría ir.
cards.example_en: Do you want to go to the movies with me? Yes, I would love to go.
cards.mnemonic_en: I nod and smile, shouting Yes like a bright sun saying sí.

cards.definition_en: A word used to give a negative answer or to refuse something.

examples.es: No, no tengo tiempo.
examples.en: No, I don't have time.

cards.example_sentence: No, I don't have time.
cards.example_es: No, no tengo tiempo.
cards.example_en: No, I don't have time.

cards.definition_en: Perhaps; possibly.

examples.es: Tal vez llueva mañana.
examples.en: Maybe it will rain tomorrow.

examples.es: Tal vez lleguemos tarde a la reunión.
examples.en: Maybe we will arrive late to the meeting.

examples.es: Tal vez ella quiera ir al cine con nosotros.
examples.en: Maybe she wants to go to the movies with us.

cards.example_sentence: Maybe it will rain tomorrow.
cards.example_es: Tal vez llueva mañana.
cards.example_en: Maybe it will rain tomorrow.
cards.mnemonic_en: A tall (tal) friend shrugs, unsure, and says maybe.

cards.definition_en: the present day; the current date

examples.es: Hoy voy al mercado.
examples.en: Today I'm going to the market.

examples.es: Tenemos una reunión importante hoy.
examples.en: We have an important meeting today.

examples.es: El clima está muy soleado hoy.
examples.en: The weather is very sunny today.

cards.example_sentence: Today I'm going to the market.
cards.example_es: Hoy voy al mercado.
cards.example_en: Today I'm going to the market.
cards.mnemonic_en: A bright toy flashes the date, reminding you it's today.

cards.definition_en: The day after today.

examples.es: Mañana iremos al parque.
examples.en: Tomorrow we will go to the park.

examples.es: Tengo una cita médica mañana por la tarde.
examples.en: I have a doctor's appointment tomorrow afternoon.

examples.es: La tienda estará cerrada mañana por ser festivo.
examples.en: The store will be closed tomorrow because it is a holiday.

cards.example_sentence: Tomorrow we will go to the park.
cards.example_es: Mañana iremos al parque.
cards.example_en: Tomorrow we will go to the park.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a tomato rowing a boat at sunrise, reminding you that mañana means tomorrow.

cards.definition_en: The day before today.
collocations: Yesterday, I went to the park

examples.es: Ayer fui al mercado y compré frutas.
examples.en: Yesterday I went to the market and bought fruit.

examples.es: Terminé de leer este libro ayer por la noche.
examples.en: I finished reading this book yesterday at night.

examples.es: El examen de matemáticas fue ayer en la escuela.
examples.en: The math exam was yesterday at school.

cards.example_sentence: Yesterday I went to the market and bought fruit.
cards.example_es: Ayer fui al mercado y compré frutas.
cards.example_en: Yesterday I went to the market and bought fruit.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a yawn (ayer) at sunrise, the day before today, that was yesterday.

cards.definition_en: Monday is the day of the week after Sunday and before Tuesday.

examples.es: El lunes voy al mercado.
examples.en: On Monday I go to the market.

examples.es: Tengo una reunión importante el próximo lunes.
examples.en: I have an important meeting next Monday.

examples.es: El lunes es el primer día de la semana laboral.
examples.en: Monday is the first day of the work week.

cards.example_sentence: On Monday I go to the market.
cards.example_es: El lunes voy al mercado.
cards.example_en: On Monday I go to the market.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a bright moon on Monday lighting the word lunes on a calendar.

cards.definition_en: Tuesday is the second day of the week, following Monday and preceding Wednesday.
synonyms_en: the second day of the week

examples.es: El próximo martes iremos al cine.
examples.en: Next Tuesday we will go to the movies.

examples.es: Tengo una cita con el dentista el martes por la mañana.
examples.en: I have a dentist appointment on Tuesday morning.

examples.es: La reunión semanal de la oficina es siempre el martes.
examples.en: The weekly office meeting is always on Tuesday.

cards.example_sentence: Next Tuesday we will go to the movies.
cards.example_es: El próximo martes iremos al cine.
cards.example_en: Next Tuesday we will go to the movies.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a tiger dancing on Tuesday, yelling Martes.

cards.definition_en: Wednesday is the third day of the week, following Tuesday and preceding Thursday.

examples.es: El próximo miércoles iremos al cine.
examples.en: Next Wednesday we will go to the movies.

examples.es: Tengo una reunión importante el miércoles por la mañana.
examples.en: I have an important meeting on Wednesday morning.

examples.es: La tienda cierra temprano todos los miércoles.
examples.en: The store closes early every Wednesday.

cards.example_sentence: Next Wednesday we will go to the movies.
cards.example_es: El próximo miércoles iremos al cine.
cards.example_en: Next Wednesday we will go to the movies.
cards.mnemonic_en: Wednesday sounds like when's day, imagine a mid‑week market called miércoles.

cards.definition_en: Thursday is the fourth day of the week, following Wednesday and preceding Friday.

examples.es: El próximo jueves iremos al cine.
examples.en: Next Thursday we will go to the movies.

examples.es: Tengo una reunión importante el jueves por la mañana.
examples.en: I have an important meeting on Thursday morning.

examples.es: La tienda cierra temprano todos los jueves.
examples.en: The store closes early every Thursday.

cards.example_sentence: Next Thursday we will go to the movies.
cards.example_es: El próximo jueves iremos al cine.
cards.example_en: Next Thursday we will go to the movies.
cards.mnemonic_en: Throw a juicy orange on Thursday to remember Jueves.

cards.definition_en: Friday is the fifth day of the week, following Thursday and preceding Saturday.

examples.es: El viernes iremos al cine.
examples.en: On Friday we will go to the movies.

examples.es: Termino de trabajar el viernes por la tarde.
examples.en: I finish working on Friday afternoon.

examples.es: La fiesta de cumpleaños es este viernes.
examples.en: The birthday party is this Friday.

cards.example_sentence: On Friday we will go to the movies.
cards.example_es: El viernes iremos al cine.
cards.example_en: On Friday we will go to the movies.
cards.mnemonic_en: I celebrate Friday by raising a 'vier' (beer) toast, linking to Viernes.

cards.definition_en: Saturday is the seventh day of the week, following Friday and preceding Sunday.

examples.es: El próximo sábado iremos al parque.
examples.en: Next Saturday we will go to the park.

examples.es: La fiesta de cumpleaños será este sábado por la noche.
examples.en: The birthday party will be this Saturday night.

examples.es: El sábado es mi día favorito de la semana porque no tengo clases.
examples.en: Saturday is my favorite day of the week because I do not have classes.

cards.example_sentence: Next Saturday we will go to the park.
cards.example_es: El próximo sábado iremos al parque.
cards.example_en: Next Saturday we will go to the park.
cards.mnemonic_en: On Saturday I hear friends cheer Sábado as we start the weekend.

cards.definition_en: Sunday is the day of the week that follows Saturday and precedes Monday.

examples.es: El próximo domingo iremos al parque.
examples.en: Next Sunday we will go to the park.

examples.es: La tienda cierra temprano cada domingo.
examples.en: The store closes early every Sunday.

examples.es: Tenemos una reunión familiar este domingo.
examples.en: We have a family gathering this Sunday.

cards.example_sentence: Next Sunday we will go to the park.
cards.example_es: El próximo domingo iremos al parque.
cards.example_en: Next Sunday we will go to the park.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a bright Sunday with a golden dome rising over the town.

cards.definition_en: January is the first month of the year in the Gregorian calendar.

examples.es: Mi cumpleaños es en enero.
examples.en: My birthday is in January.

examples.es: El año comienza en enero.
examples.en: The year begins in January.

examples.es: Hace mucho frío en enero.
examples.en: It is very cold in January.

cards.example_sentence: My birthday is in January.
cards.example_es: Mi cumpleaños es en enero.
cards.example_en: My birthday is in January.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a January snowflake shaped like the letter E for Enero.

cards.definition_en: The second month of the year in the Gregorian calendar.

examples.es: Mi cumpleaños es en febrero.
examples.en: My birthday is in February.

examples.es: El mes más corto del año es febrero.
examples.en: The shortest month of the year is February.

examples.es: Nos vamos de vacaciones a la nieve en febrero.
examples.en: We are going on a ski vacation in February.

cards.example_sentence: My birthday is in February.
cards.example_es: Mi cumpleaños es en febrero.
cards.example_en: My birthday is in February.
cards.mnemonic_en: A feverish bear (Febrero) shivers during February.

cards.definition_en: The third month of the year in the Gregorian calendar.

examples.es: Mi cumpleaños es en marzo.
examples.en: My birthday is in March.

examples.es: Las clases terminan a finales de marzo.
examples.en: Classes end at the end of March.

examples.es: El clima empieza a mejorar en marzo.
examples.en: The weather starts to get better in March.

cards.example_sentence: My birthday is in March.
cards.example_es: Mi cumpleaños es en marzo.
cards.example_en: My birthday is in March.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a marching band in March holding a banner that reads 'Marzo'.

cards.example_en: My head hurts.
