cards.definition_en: The organ of sight in humans and many animals.
collocations: in the blink of an eye

examples.es: Me duele el ojo.
examples.en: My eye hurts.

examples.es: Cierra el ojo derecho para apuntar mejor.
examples.en: Close your right eye to aim better.

examples.es: Le entró una basurita en el ojo.
examples.en: A little bit of dust got into his eye.

cards.example_sentence: My eye hurts.
cards.example_es: Me duele el ojo.
cards.example_en: My eye hurts.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an eye shaped like an O that says 'jo' when you look.

cards.definition_en: The protruding organ on the face used for smelling and breathing.

examples.es: Me duele la nariz cuando respiro aire frío.
examples.en: My nose hurts when I breathe cold air.

examples.es: El payaso tiene una nariz roja y muy grande.
examples.en: The clown has a red and very big nose.

examples.es: Ella se limpia la nariz con un pañuelo de papel.
examples.en: She wipes her nose with a tissue.

cards.example_sentence: My nose hurts when I breathe cold air.
cards.example_es: Me duele la nariz cuando respiro aire frío.
cards.example_en: My nose hurts when I breathe cold air.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a nose shouting no while a giant naríz watches it.

cards.definition_en: The opening in the face through which a person eats, speaks, and breathes.

examples.es: Me duele la boca después de comer helado.
examples.en: My mouth hurts after eating ice cream.

examples.es: Cierra la boca mientras masticas la comida.
examples.en: Close your mouth while you chew your food.

examples.es: El dentista me pidió que abriera la boca para revisarme.
examples.en: The dentist asked me to open my mouth for a checkup.

cards.example_sentence: My mouth hurts after eating ice cream.
cards.example_es: Me duele la boca después de comer helado.
cards.example_en: My mouth hurts after eating ice cream.
cards.mnemonic_en: My mouth says boca when I chew tacos

cards.definition_en: The five‑fingered, prehensile extremity at the end of a human arm used for grasping and manipulating objects.

examples.es: Me duele la mano después de golpear la mesa.
examples.en: My hand hurts after hitting the table.

examples.es: Levanta la mano si sabes la respuesta.
examples.en: Raise your hand if you know the answer.

examples.es: Ella sostiene una manzana en la mano.
examples.en: She is holding an apple in her hand.

cards.example_sentence: My hand hurts after hitting the table.
cards.example_es: Me duele la mano después de golpear la mesa.
cards.example_en: My hand hurts after hitting the table.
cards.mnemonic_en: I hand you a mano of cards.

cards.definition_en: The upper limb of the human body extending from the shoulder to the hand.

examples.es: Me duele el brazo después de levantar pesas.
examples.en: My arm hurts after lifting weights.

examples.es: Ella tiene un tatuaje pequeño en su brazo derecho.
examples.en: She has a small tattoo on her right arm.

examples.es: El médico me tomó la presión en el brazo.
examples.en: The doctor checked my blood pressure on my arm.

cards.example_sentence: My arm hurts after lifting weights.
cards.example_es: Me duele el brazo después de levantar pesas.
cards.example_en: My arm hurts after lifting weights.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a muscular arm holding a bra, turning it into a brazo.

cards.definition_en: A limb of the human body used for standing and walking, extending from the hip to the foot.

examples.es: Me duele la pierna después de correr.
examples.en: My leg hurts after running.

examples.es: El jugador se rompió la pierna durante el partido de fútbol.
examples.en: The player broke his leg during the soccer match.

examples.es: Ella tiene un tatuaje pequeño en la pierna.
examples.en: She has a small tattoo on her leg.

cards.example_sentence: My leg hurts after running.
cards.example_es: Me duele la pierna después de correr.
cards.example_en: My leg hurts after running.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a leg leaning on a pier, the pier says na to keep it steady.

cards.definition_en: The lower extremity of the leg on which a person stands and walks.

examples.es: Me duele el pie después de correr.
examples.en: My foot hurts after running.

examples.es: Él se puso el zapato en el pie derecho.
examples.en: He put the shoe on his right foot.

examples.es: Ella se rompió el pie al caerse de la bicicleta.
examples.en: She broke her foot when she fell off the bike.

cards.example_sentence: My foot hurts after running.
cards.example_es: Me duele el pie después de correr.
cards.example_en: My foot hurts after running.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a foot stepping on a tasty pie, because foot sounds just like the Spanish word pie.

cards.definition_en: The rear surface of a person or object, opposite the front.

examples.es: Me duele la espalda después de correr.
examples.en: My back hurts after running.

examples.es: Llevo una mochila pesada sobre la espalda.
examples.en: I am carrying a heavy backpack on my back.

examples.es: Él se recostó contra la pared para descansar la espalda.
examples.en: He leaned against the wall to rest his back.

cards.example_sentence: My back hurts after running.
cards.example_es: Me duele la espalda después de correr.
cards.example_en: My back hurts after running.
cards.mnemonic_en: I turned my back and felt my espalda ache.

cards.definition_en: The front part of a person's head that includes the eyes, nose, and mouth.

examples.es: Ella tiene una cara muy amable.
examples.en: She has a very friendly face.

examples.es: Lávate la cara antes de ir a dormir.
examples.en: Wash your face before going to sleep.

examples.es: El viento frío le golpeaba la cara mientras caminaba.
examples.en: The cold wind hit his face while he was walking.

cards.example_sentence: She has a very friendly face.
cards.example_es: Ella tiene una cara muy amable.
cards.example_en: She has a very friendly face.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a bright cara painted on every face you meet.

cards.definition_en: Hair is the thin strands that grow from the skin of humans and animals, especially on the head.

examples.es: Me corté el pelo ayer.
examples.en: I cut my hair yesterday.

examples.es: Ella tiene el pelo muy largo y rubio.
examples.en: She has very long, blonde hair.

examples.es: El peluquero me lavó el pelo con champú.
examples.en: The hairdresser washed my hair with shampoo.

cards.example_sentence: I cut my hair yesterday.
cards.example_es: Me corté el pelo ayer.
cards.example_en: I cut my hair yesterday.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a single hair as a tiny 'pelo' dancing on a breeze.

cards.definition_en: The organ of hearing located on each side of the head.
collocations: in one ear and out the other

examples.es: Me duele la oreja derecha.
examples.en: My right ear hurts.

examples.es: El médico me revisó la oreja con una linterna.
examples.en: The doctor checked my ear with a flashlight.

examples.es: Ella se puso un pendiente brillante en la oreja.
examples.en: She put a shiny earring on her ear.

cards.example_sentence: My right ear hurts.
cards.example_es: Me duele la oreja derecha.
cards.example_en: My right ear hurts.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an ear shaped like an OREJA, the Spanish word, catching sound waves.

cards.definition_en: A clear, colorless, odorless, and tasteless liquid that makes up seas, lakes, rivers, and rain, and is essential for most life.

examples.es: Necesito beber agua.
examples.en: I need to drink water.

examples.es: Las plantas del jardín necesitan agua todos los días.
examples.en: The garden plants need water every day.

examples.es: Por favor, pon un poco de agua en el cuenco del perro.
examples.en: Please put some water in the dog's bowl.

cards.example_sentence: I need to drink water.
cards.example_es: Necesito beber agua.
cards.example_en: I need to drink water.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a blue aqua (agua) faucet gushing water.

cards.definition_en: A staple food made from flour and water, typically baked.

examples.es: Me gusta comer pan recién horneado cada mañana.
examples.en: I like to eat fresh bread every morning.

examples.es: Unté un poco de mantequilla sobre la rebanada de pan.
examples.en: I spread some butter on the slice of bread.

examples.es: Fuimos a la panadería para comprar pan para el almuerzo.
examples.en: We went to the bakery to buy bread for lunch.

cards.example_sentence: I like to eat fresh bread every morning.
cards.example_es: Me gusta comer pan recién horneado cada mañana.
cards.example_en: I like to eat fresh bread every morning.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a pan of dough turning into fresh bread.

cards.definition_en: Milk is the white liquid produced by the mammary glands of mammals, commonly consumed as a beverage and used in cooking.

examples.es: Me gusta tomar leche antes de dormir.
examples.en: I like to drink milk before going to bed.

examples.es: El gato tiene mucha hambre y quiere un poco de leche.
examples.en: The cat is very hungry and wants some milk.

examples.es: Por favor, añade un chorrito de leche a mi café.
examples.en: Please add a splash of milk to my coffee.

cards.example_sentence: I like to drink milk before going to bed.
cards.example_es: Me gusta tomar leche antes de dormir.
cards.example_en: I like to drink milk before going to bed.
cards.mnemonic_en: Milk sounds like mil—imagine a cow saying leche as it gives you fresh milk.

cards.definition_en: A round fruit with red, green, or yellow skin and a sweet, crisp flesh, typically grown on apple trees.

examples.es: Compré una manzana en el mercado.
examples.en: I bought an apple at the market.

examples.es: Ella cortó la manzana con un cuchillo para merendar.
examples.en: She sliced the apple with a knife for a snack.

examples.es: El gusano salió de la manzana roja.
examples.en: The worm crawled out of the red apple.

cards.example_sentence: I bought an apple at the market.
cards.example_es: Compré una manzana en el mercado.
cards.example_en: I bought an apple at the market.
cards.mnemonic_en: A man bites a crisp apple and shouts zana!

cards.definition_en: A domesticated carnivorous mammal commonly kept as a pet or used for work, known for its loyalty and barking.

examples.es: El perro corre en el parque.
examples.en: The dog runs in the park.

examples.es: Mi perro duerme sobre la alfombra de la sala.
examples.en: My dog sleeps on the living room rug.

examples.es: El perro ladra cuando escucha al cartero.
examples.en: The dog barks when it hears the mailman.

cards.example_sentence: The dog runs in the park.
cards.example_es: El perro corre en el parque.
cards.example_en: The dog runs in the park.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a dog wearing a pair of O-shaped medals around its neck.

cards.definition_en: A small domesticated carnivorous mammal with soft fur, often kept as a pet.

examples.es: El gato duerme en el sofá.
examples.en: The cat sleeps on the sofa.

examples.es: Mi gato persigue a un ratón por la cocina.
examples.en: My cat chases a mouse through the kitchen.

examples.es: El gato maúlla porque tiene mucha hambre.
examples.en: The cat meows because it is very hungry.

cards.example_sentence: The cat sleeps on the sofa.
cards.example_es: El gato duerme en el sofá.
cards.example_en: The cat sleeps on the sofa.
cards.mnemonic_en: A cat named Gato purrs while chasing a bright laser dot

cards.definition_en: A bound collection of written or printed pages that can be read.

examples.es: Estoy leyendo un libro interesante.
examples.en: I am reading an interesting book.

examples.es: Ella cerró el libro después de terminar el último capítulo.
examples.en: She closed the book after finishing the last chapter.

examples.es: Por favor, coloca el libro en el estante superior.
examples.en: Please place the book on the top shelf.

cards.example_sentence: I am reading an interesting book.
cards.example_es: Estoy leyendo un libro interesante.
cards.example_en: I am reading an interesting book.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a librarian shouting 'Libro!' as he hands you a huge book.

cards.definition_en: An institution where children and young adults receive education.

examples.es: La escuela está cerrada hoy.
examples.en: The school is closed today.

examples.es: Los niños caminan hacia la escuela todas las mañanas.
examples.en: The children walk to school every morning.

examples.es: Ella estudia mucho en la escuela para sacar buenas notas.
examples.en: She studies hard at school to get good grades.

cards.example_sentence: The school is closed today.
cards.example_es: La escuela está cerrada hoy.
cards.example_en: The school is closed today.
cards.mnemonic_en: School sounds like es-cool-a, so picture a super cool school building.

cards.definition_en: A person who teaches, especially in a school.

examples.es: El profesor explicó la lección con claridad.
examples.en: The teacher explained the lesson clearly.

examples.es: Los estudiantes escuchan atentamente cuando habla el profesor.
examples.en: The students listen carefully when the teacher speaks.

examples.es: Después de la clase, fui a la oficina del profesor para hacer una pregunta.
examples.en: After class, I went to the teacher office to ask a question.

cards.example_sentence: The teacher explained the lesson clearly.
cards.example_es: El profesor explicó la lección con claridad.
cards.example_en: The teacher explained the lesson clearly.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a teacher in a professor's cap shouting teach er like a Spanish profesor.

cards.definition_en: A person who is enrolled in an educational institution or is studying.

examples.es: El estudiante estudia para el examen.
examples.en: The student studies for the exam.

examples.es: Cada estudiante tiene un libro en su pupitre.
examples.en: Each student has a book on their desk.

examples.es: El profesor saluda al estudiante en la puerta del aula.
examples.en: The teacher greets the student at the classroom door.

cards.example_sentence: The student studies for the exam.
cards.example_es: El estudiante estudia para el examen.
cards.example_en: The student studies for the exam.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a stud wearing an est badge, reminding you that student means estudiante.

cards.definition_en: To cause something to become not closed or to allow access.

examples.es: Voy a abrir la ventana.
examples.en: I am going to open the window.

examples.es: Por favor, abre el regalo ahora.
examples.en: Please open the gift now.

examples.es: Tienes que abrir la puerta con esta llave.
examples.en: You have to open the door with this key.

cards.example_sentence: I am going to open the window.
cards.example_es: Voy a abrir la ventana.
cards.example_en: I am going to open the window.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a breezy wind abrir the door and the door swings open

cards.definition_en: To shut something so that it is no longer open.

examples.es: Por favor, cierra la puerta cuando salgas.
examples.en: Please close the door when you leave.

examples.es: Debes cerrar todas las ventanas antes de que empiece a llover.
examples.en: You must close all the windows before it starts to rain.

examples.es: El banco va a cerrar en diez minutos.
examples.en: The bank is going to close in ten minutes.

cards.example_sentence: Please close the door when you leave.
cards.example_es: Por favor, cierra la puerta cuando salgas.
cards.example_en: Please close the door when you leave.
cards.mnemonic_en: I close the lid and hear the Spanish word cerrar humming.

cards.definition_en: To look at and understand the meaning of written or printed material.

examples.es: Me gusta leer antes de dormir.
examples.en: I like to read before going to bed.

examples.es: Los niños aprenden a leer en la escuela.
examples.en: Children learn to read at school.

examples.es: Necesito leer este documento para la reunión.
examples.en: I need to read this document for the meeting.

cards.example_sentence: I like to read before going to bed.
cards.example_es: Me gusta leer antes de dormir.
cards.example_en: I like to read before going to bed.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a red book titled Leer on the shelf as you read.

cards.definition_en: To produce text or symbols on a surface using a pen, pencil, keyboard, or other instrument.

examples.es: Por favor, toma un lápiz y empieza a escribir tu nombre en la hoja.
examples.en: Please take a pencil and start to Write your name on the sheet.

examples.es: Ella necesita escribir una carta formal para solicitar el nuevo empleo.
examples.en: She needs to Write a formal letter to apply for the new job.

examples.es: Los niños aprenden a escribir frases cortas en su cuaderno de clase.
examples.en: The children learn to Write short sentences in their class notebook.

cards.example_sentence: Please take a pencil and start to Write your name on the sheet.
cards.example_es: Por favor, toma un lápiz y empieza a escribir tu nombre en la hoja.
cards.example_en: Please take a pencil and start to Write your name on the sheet.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a pen writing 'es' on a crib, reminding you that escribir means write.

cards.definition_en: To give attention to sounds by hearing them.

examples.es: Me gusta escuchar música mientras estudio.
examples.en: I like to listen to music while I study.

examples.es: Por favor, escucha con atención lo que dice el profesor.
examples.en: Please listen carefully to what the teacher says.

examples.es: Debes escuchar el consejo de tus padres.
examples.en: You should listen to the advice of your parents.

cards.example_sentence: I like to listen to music while I study.
cards.example_es: Me gusta escuchar música mientras estudio.
cards.example_en: I like to listen to music while I study.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a pirate whispering "escucha" as he leans in, urging you to listen.

cards.definition_en: To utter words or communicate verbally.

examples.es: Me gusta hablar con mis amigos.
examples.en: I like to speak with my friends.

examples.es: Debes hablar más despacio para que te entienda.
examples.en: You must speak more slowly so I can understand you.

examples.es: Es importante hablar inglés en la oficina.
examples.en: It is important to speak English in the office.

cards.example_sentence: I like to speak with my friends.
cards.example_es: Me gusta hablar con mis amigos.
cards.example_en: I like to speak with my friends.
cards.mnemonic_en: A tiny speck whispers 'habla' into your ear, reminding you that speak means hablar.

cards.definition_en: To consume food or drink.

examples.es: Me gusta comer pizza los viernes.
examples.en: I like to eat pizza on Fridays.

examples.es: Debemos comer antes de ir al cine.
examples.en: We must eat before going to the movies.

examples.es: Los niños quieren comer un helado de chocolate.
examples.en: The children want to eat a chocolate ice cream.

cards.example_sentence: I like to eat pizza on Fridays.
cards.example_es: Me gusta comer pizza los viernes.
cards.example_en: I like to eat pizza on Fridays.
cards.mnemonic_en: When I eat, a loud COMER echo rings from my stomach.

cards.definition_en: To consume a liquid.

examples.es: Me gusta beber agua después de correr.
examples.en: I like to drink water after running.

examples.es: Debes beber mucha leche para crecer fuerte.
examples.en: You must drink a lot of milk to grow strong.

examples.es: Es importante beber café caliente en la mañana.
examples.en: It is important to drink hot coffee in the morning.

cards.example_sentence: I like to drink water after running.
cards.example_es: Me gusta beber agua después de correr.
cards.example_en: I like to drink water after running.
cards.mnemonic_en: I sip a cold 'beber' brew every time I drink.

cards.definition_en: to move or travel from one place to another

examples.es: Voy al mercado cada mañana.
examples.en: I go to the market every morning.

examples.es: Debes ir a la cama temprano esta noche.
examples.en: You must go to bed early tonight.

examples.es: Vamos a ir al cine para ver la nueva película.
examples.en: We are going to go to the cinema to watch the new movie.

cards.example_sentence: I go to the market every morning.
cards.example_es: Voy al mercado cada mañana.
cards.example_en: I go to the market every morning.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a goat shouting go as it runs, hearing the Spanish Ir echo across the hills.

cards.definition_en: to move or travel toward a place or person

examples.es: ¿Puedes venir a mi casa mañana?
examples.en: Can you come to my house tomorrow?

examples.es: Por favor, ven aquí ahora mismo.
examples.en: Please come here right now.

examples.es: Ellos van a venir a la fiesta esta noche.
examples.en: They are going to come to the party tonight.

cards.example_sentence: Can you come to my house tomorrow?
cards.example_es: ¿Puedes venir a mi casa mañana?
cards.example_en: Can you come to my house tomorrow?
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a dog barking Come while you venir from the garden

cards.definition_en: To perceive something with the eyes.

examples.es: ¿Puedes ver la montaña desde aquí?
examples.en: Can you see the mountain from here?

examples.es: Quiero ver al médico hoy.
examples.en: I want to see the doctor today.

examples.es: Veremos una película esta noche.
examples.en: We will see a movie tonight.

cards.example_sentence: Can you see the mountain from here?
cards.example_es: ¿Puedes ver la montaña desde aquí?
cards.example_en: Can you see the mountain from here?
cards.mnemonic_en: I see a ver-y clear sky.

cards.definition_en: To desire or wish for something.

examples.es: Quiero viajar a España este verano.
examples.en: I want to travel to Spain this summer.

examples.es: Los niños quieren comer helado de chocolate.
examples.en: The children want to eat chocolate ice cream.

examples.es: ¿Quieres comprar este libro en la librería?
examples.en: Do you want to buy this book at the bookstore?

cards.example_sentence: I want to travel to Spain this summer.
cards.example_es: Quiero viajar a España este verano.
cards.example_en: I want to travel to Spain this summer.
cards.mnemonic_en: I want a wan (pale) taco because I 'querer' it.

cards.definition_en: To require something because it is necessary or desirable.

examples.es: Necesito comprar leche.
examples.en: I need to buy milk.

examples.es: Ellos necesitan estudiar para el examen de mañana.
examples.en: They need to study for the exam tomorrow.

examples.es: Necesitamos llamar a un taxi para ir al aeropuerto.
examples.en: We need to call a taxi to go to the airport.

cards.example_sentence: I need to buy milk.
cards.example_es: Necesito comprar leche.
cards.example_en: I need to buy milk.
cards.mnemonic_en: My knee needs a seat on the bench.

cards.definition_en: Having a large size, extent, or magnitude.

examples.es: El perro es muy grande.
examples.en: The dog is very big.

examples.es: Necesito una maleta grande para mi viaje.
examples.en: I need a big suitcase for my trip.

examples.es: La casa tiene una ventana grande en la sala.
examples.en: The house has a big window in the living room.

cards.example_sentence: The dog is very big.
cards.example_es: El perro es muy grande.
cards.example_en: The dog is very big.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a BIG elephant wearing a GRANDE sombrero

cards.definition_en: Having a limited size, amount, or extent.

examples.es: El perro es pequeño pero muy valiente.
examples.en: The dog is small but very brave.

examples.es: Necesito una caja pequeño para guardar mis llaves.
examples.en: I need a small box to keep my keys.

examples.es: Ellos viven en un apartamento pequeño en el centro de la ciudad.
examples.en: They live in a small apartment in the city center.

cards.example_sentence: The dog is small but very brave.
cards.example_es: El perro es pequeño pero muy valiente.
cards.example_en: The dog is small but very brave.
cards.mnemonic_en: A tiny (pequeño) mouse sniffs a small crumb.

cards.definition_en: Recently created, discovered, or introduced; not existing before.

examples.es: Compré un coche nuevo.
examples.en: I bought a new car.

examples.es: Ella tiene un trabajo nuevo en la ciudad.
examples.en: She has a new job in the city.

examples.es: Necesito comprar un teléfono nuevo porque el mío no funciona.
examples.en: I need to buy a new phone because mine does not work.

cards.example_sentence: I bought a new car.
cards.example_es: Compré un coche nuevo.
cards.example_en: I bought a new car.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a newborn baby holding a fresh, new blanket, echoing the nu sound of nuevo

cards.definition_en: Having existed or been in use for a long time; not new.

examples.es: El libro viejo está en la estantería.
examples.en: The old book is on the shelf.

examples.es: Mi abuelo es un hombre viejo pero muy amable.
examples.en: My grandfather is an old man but very kind.

examples.es: Ellos viven en una casa vieja de madera.
examples.en: They live in an old wooden house.

cards.example_sentence: The old book is on the shelf.
cards.example_es: El libro viejo está en la estantería.
cards.example_en: The old book is on the shelf.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an old wizard saying VIEJO while opening a dusty ancient book.

cards.definition_en: Feeling or showing pleasure, contentment, or joy.

examples.es: Estoy feliz con los resultados.
examples.en: I am happy with the results.

examples.es: Ella se siente muy feliz por su nuevo trabajo.
examples.en: She feels very happy about her new job.

examples.es: Los niños están tan feliz al abrir sus regalos.
examples.en: The children are so happy when opening their gifts.

cards.example_sentence: I am happy with the results.
cards.example_es: Estoy feliz con los resultados.
cards.example_en: I am happy with the results.
cards.mnemonic_en: A happy clown shouts Feliz as he receives a big birthday cake.

title: Cafe Counter Basics
description: Short English needed for simple cafe orders.

cards.definition_en: A clear, colorless, odorless, and tasteless liquid that makes up seas, lakes, rivers, and rain, and is essential for most life.

examples.es: Por favor, ¿me puede dar un vaso de agua?
examples.en: Please, can I have a glass of water?

examples.es: Tengo mucha sed, ¿tienen agua embotellada?
examples.en: I am very thirsty, do you have bottled water?

examples.es: Para acompañar mi sándwich, quiero pedir agua.

cards.example_sentence: Please go to the pickup area to get your coffee.
cards.example_es: Por favor, pase por la zona de recogida para llevarse su café.
cards.example_en: Please go to the pickup area to get your coffee.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture yourself picking up a big recogida bag of groceries.

cards.definition_en: Quiet and restrained; not inclined to share thoughts or feelings openly.

examples.es: El asiento junto a la ventana está reservado para los pasajeros de primera clase.
examples.en: The seat next to the window is reserved for first-class passengers.

examples.es: Esta mesa pequeña en la esquina está reservado para una pareja que llegará pronto.
examples.en: This small table in the corner is reserved for a couple arriving soon.

examples.es: El mostrador de pedidos está reservado para los clientes que tienen una reserva previa.
examples.en: The ordering counter is reserved for customers who have a prior booking.

cards.example_sentence: The seat next to the window is reserved for first-class passengers.
cards.example_es: El asiento junto a la ventana está reservado para los pasajeros de primera clase.
cards.example_en: The seat next to the window is reserved for first-class passengers.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a quiet librarian locking a book in a reserved, secret 'reservado' shelf.

cards.definition_en: Not costing any money; available without payment.

examples.es: Esta mesa está libre, ¿puedo sentarme aquí?
examples.en: This table is free, may I sit here?

examples.es: El baño está libre ahora mismo.
examples.en: The restroom is free right now.

examples.es: La silla junto a la ventana está libre.
examples.en: The chair by the window is free.

cards.example_sentence: This table is free, may I sit here?
cards.example_es: Esta mesa está libre, ¿puedo sentarme aquí?
cards.example_en: This table is free, may I sit here?
cards.mnemonic_en: Free feels like libre—see a bird escaping a cage, shouting Libre!

cards.definition_en: Being used or taken by someone; not free.

examples.es: No te sientes en esa mesa porque está ocupado.
examples.en: Do not sit at that table because it is occupied.

examples.es: El baño está ocupado en este momento.
examples.en: The restroom is occupied at the moment.

examples.es: Disculpe, ¿este asiento está ocupado?
examples.en: Excuse me, is this seat occupied?

cards.example_sentence: Do not sit at that table because it is occupied.
cards.example_es: No te sientes en esa mesa porque está ocupado.
cards.example_en: Do not sit at that table because it is occupied.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a busy office where every desk is occupied, just like the Spanish word ocupado.

cards.definition_en: to take a seat.

examples.es: Por favor, siéntese en la mesa junto a la ventana.
examples.en: Please sit down at the table by the window.

examples.es: Puede siéntese aquí mientras preparo su café.
examples.en: You can sit down here while I prepare your coffee.

examples.es: Siéntese en la barra si prefiere ver cómo hago el espresso.
examples.en: Sit down at the counter if you prefer to watch me make the espresso.

cards.example_sentence: Please sit down at the table by the window.
cards.example_es: Por favor, siéntese en la mesa junto a la ventana.
cards.example_en: Please sit down at the table by the window.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine sending a seat to someone, then you sit down.

cards.definition_en: to remain in place or stay inactive until something happens

examples.es: Por favor, espera aquí hasta que regrese.
examples.en: Please wait here until I return.

examples.es: Debes esperar en la fila para pedir tu café.
examples.en: You must wait in line to order your coffee.

examples.es: Si la mesa está ocupada, tendrás que esperar un momento.
examples.en: If the table is occupied, you will have to wait a moment.

cards.example_sentence: Please wait here until I return.
cards.example_es: Por favor, espera aquí hasta que regrese.
cards.example_en: Please wait here until I return.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture yourself waiting as an esper mind‑reader checks the timer.

cards.definition_en: A row of people or objects arranged one after another.

examples.es: Ponte al final de la cola para pedir tu café.
examples.en: Stand at the end of the line to order your coffee.

examples.es: Por favor, espere su turno al final de la cola.
examples.en: Please wait for your turn at the end of the line.

examples.es: La cola para pedir café es muy lenta hoy.
examples.en: The line to order coffee is very slow today.

cards.example_sentence: Stand at the end of the line to order your coffee.
cards.example_es: Ponte al final de la cola para pedir tu café.
cards.example_en: Stand at the end of the line to order your coffee.
cards.mnemonic_en: A line looks like a long cola (tail) stretching forward.

cards.definition_en: A person or organization that purchases goods or services from a business.

examples.es: El cliente pidió una factura detallada.
examples.en: The customer requested a detailed invoice.

examples.es: El cliente espera en la fila para pedir su café.
examples.en: The customer is waiting in line to order their coffee.

examples.es: El cliente dejó una propina sobre la mesa.
examples.en: The customer left a tip on the table.

cards.example_sentence: The customer requested a detailed invoice.
cards.example_es: El cliente pidió una factura detallada.
cards.example_en: The customer requested a detailed invoice.
cards.mnemonic_en: The customer sounds like client and hands a receipt to the cliente.

cards.definition_en: A person who serves food and drinks to customers in a restaurant or café.

examples.es: El camarero trajo la cuenta rápidamente.
examples.en: The server brought the check quickly.

examples.es: Le pedí un café extra al camarero.
examples.en: I asked the server for an extra coffee.

examples.es: El camarero nos recomendó el pastel del día.
examples.en: The server recommended the cake of the day to us.

cards.example_sentence: The server brought the check quickly.
cards.example_es: El camarero trajo la cuenta rápidamente.
cards.example_en: The server brought the check quickly.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a server handing a tray to a smiling camaro driver, the camarero.

cards.definition_en: A person who prepares and serves coffee and other drinks, typically in a coffee shop.

examples.es: El barista preparó un cappuccino perfecto.
examples.en: The barista made a perfect cappuccino.

cards.example_sentence: The barista made a perfect cappuccino.
cards.example_es: El barista preparó un cappuccino perfecto.
cards.example_en: The barista made a perfect cappuccino.

cards.definition_en: A machine used in stores to record sales transactions and hold cash.

examples.es: La caja registradora se quedó sin papel.
examples.en: The cash register ran out of paper.

examples.es: El cliente pagó en efectivo en la caja registradora.
examples.en: The customer paid with cash at the cash register.

examples.es: Por favor, abre la caja registradora para darme el cambio.
examples.en: Please open the cash register to give me my change.

cards.example_sentence: The cash register ran out of paper.
cards.example_es: La caja registradora se quedó sin papel.
cards.example_en: The cash register ran out of paper.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cash register as a giant caja that registers every cash coin.

cards.definition_en: A sum of money given in exchange for goods, services, or to settle a debt.

examples.es: El pago por el café se hace en la caja.
examples.en: The payment for the coffee is made at the register.

examples.es: Por favor, ¿cómo desea realizar el pago?
examples.en: Please, how would you like to make the payment?

examples.es: El sistema no acepta este método de pago.
examples.en: The system does not accept this method of payment.

cards.example_sentence: The payment for the coffee is made at the register.
cards.example_es: El pago por el café se hace en la caja.
cards.example_en: The payment for the coffee is made at the register.
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a PAYing MENTor handing a coin for each PAGO you settle.

cards.definition_en: A small piece of paper or plastic used for identification, payment, or playing games.

examples.es: Necesito mi tarjeta de crédito para pagar la cuenta.
examples.en: I need my credit card to pay the bill.

examples.es: El cajero me pidió la tarjeta para procesar el pago del café.
examples.en: The cashier asked for my card to process the coffee payment.

examples.es: Lo siento, aquí no aceptamos efectivo, solo tarjeta.
examples.en: I am sorry, we do not accept cash here, only card.

cards.example_sentence: I need my credit card to pay the bill.
cards.example_es: Necesito mi tarjeta de crédito para pagar la cuenta.
cards.example_en: I need my credit card to pay the bill.
cards.mnemonic_en: I picture a card shaped like a tiny tarjeta with a car driving on it.

cards.definition_en: Money in the form of coins and banknotes that is readily available for transactions.

examples.es: Prefiero pagar en efectivo.
examples.en: I prefer to pay in cash.

examples.es: Lo siento, solo aceptamos efectivo en este café.
examples.en: I am sorry, we only accept cash at this cafe.

examples.es: ¿Tiene cambio si pago con efectivo?
examples.en: Do you have change if I pay with cash?

cards.example_sentence: I prefer to pay in cash.
cards.example_es: Prefiero pagar en efectivo.
cards.example_en: I prefer to pay in cash.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a cash register shouting Efectivo as it prints money.

cards.definition_en: the act or result of making something different, a transformation or alteration.

examples.es: Aquí tiene su café, y aquí tiene su cambio.
examples.en: Here is your coffee, and here is your change.

examples.es: Disculpe, creo que me ha dado poco cambio.
examples.en: Excuse me, I think you gave me the wrong change.

examples.es: No necesito el cambio, quédeselo de propina.
examples.en: I do not need the change, keep it as a tip.

cards.example_sentence: Here is your coffee, and here is your change.
cards.example_es: Aquí tiene su café, y aquí tiene su cambio.
cards.example_en: Here is your coffee, and here is your change.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cashier handing you a fresh stack of bills, a cambio, to remember Change.

cards.definition_en: A small amount of money given to someone as a gratuity for their service.

examples.es: Dejé una buena propina al camarero.
examples.en: I left a good tip for the waiter.

examples.es: No olvides incluir la propina en el total de la cuenta.
examples.en: Do not forget to include the tip in the total of the bill.

examples.es: El servicio fue excelente, así que añadí un 20% de propina.
examples.en: The service was excellent, so I added a 20% tip.

cards.example_sentence: I left a good tip for the waiter.
cards.example_es: Dejé una buena propina al camarero.
cards.example_en: I left a good tip for the waiter.
cards.mnemonic_en: Tip the waiter with a tiny propina, like sprinkling a pinch of salt.

cards.definition_en: A written acknowledgment that something, typically a payment, has been received.

examples.es: Aquí tiene su recibo por el pedido que acaba de realizar.
examples.en: Here is your receipt for the order you just placed.

examples.es: Necesito el recibo para comprobar el precio de los pasteles.
examples.en: I need the receipt to check the price of the pastries.

examples.es: El cajero imprimió el recibo después de pagar el desayuno.
examples.en: The cashier printed the receipt after I paid for breakfast.

cards.example_sentence: Here is your receipt for the order you just placed.
cards.example_es: Aquí tiene su recibo por el pedido que acaba de realizar.
cards.example_en: Here is your receipt for the order you just placed.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a receipt with the bold word Recibo printed on it.

cards.definition_en: A bill that is issued separately from other charges.

examples.es: Somos de empresas distintas, así que queremos la cuenta separada.
examples.en: We are from different companies, so we want the separate bill.

examples.es: Solo pedí un café, así que necesito una cuenta separada.
examples.en: I only ordered a coffee, so I need a separate bill.

examples.es: Mi amigo y yo nos sentamos en mesas diferentes, así que pedimos la cuenta separada.
examples.en: My friend and I sat at different tables, so we asked for the separate bill.

cards.example_sentence: We are from different companies, so we want the separate bill.
cards.example_es: Somos de empresas distintas, así que queremos la cuenta separada.
cards.example_en: We are from different companies, so we want the separate bill.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a separate bill, a split cuenta left on the table.

cards.definition_en: Asking if it is possible to make a payment now.
collocations: Can I pay now or later?
Can I pay now with a credit card?
Can I pay now and get a receipt?
synonyms_en: Is it possible to pay now?
Can I settle the bill now?

examples.es: Tengo prisa por irme, ¿puedo pagar ahora?
examples.en: I am in a hurry to leave, can I pay now?

examples.es: Ya terminé mi café, ¿puedo pagar ahora?
examples.en: I finished my coffee, can I pay now?

examples.es: Tengo prisa por irme a trabajar, ¿puedo pagar ahora?
examples.en: I am in a rush to get to work, can I pay now?

cards.example_sentence: I am in a hurry to leave, can I pay now?
cards.example_es: Tengo prisa por irme, ¿puedo pagar ahora?
cards.example_en: I am in a hurry to leave, can I pay now?
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a tin can paying a bill right now, shouting 'Can I pay now?' like a Spanish shopper.

cards.definition_en: A polite way to ask if a business accepts credit or debit cards.

examples.es: No tengo efectivo, ¿aceptan tarjeta?
examples.en: I do not have cash, do you take cards?

examples.es: Quiero pagar mi café, ¿aceptan tarjeta?
examples.en: I want to pay for my coffee, do you take cards?

examples.es: La cuenta es de diez dólares, ¿aceptan tarjeta?
examples.en: The bill is ten dollars, do you take cards?

cards.example_sentence: I do not have cash, do you take cards?
cards.example_es: No tengo efectivo, ¿aceptan tarjeta?
cards.example_en: I do not have cash, do you take cards?
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a shopkeeper holding a deck, asking Accept an card? Do you take cards?

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that an item or element is absent.
collocations: something is missing in the report

examples.es: Falta algo en mi pedido; solo recibí el café pero no el azúcar.
examples.en: Something is missing from my order; I only received the coffee but not the sugar.

examples.es: Falta algo en la bandeja; pedí dos croissants y solo hay uno.
examples.en: Something is missing from the tray; I ordered two croissants and there is only one.

examples.es: Falta algo en esta cuenta; el precio del té no aparece aquí.
examples.en: Something is missing from this bill; the price of the tea does not appear here.

cards.example_sentence: Something is missing from my order; I only received the coffee but not the sugar.
cards.example_es: Falta algo en mi pedido; solo recibí el café pero no el azúcar.
cards.example_en: Something is missing from my order; I only received the coffee but not the sugar.
cards.mnemonic_en: A faulty gap appears where the word 'falta' signals something is missing

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that there is no onion.

examples.es: Por favor, prepare mi sándwich sin cebolla.
examples.en: Please prepare my sandwich No onion.

examples.es: Por favor, prepare mi hamburguesa sin cebolla.
examples.en: Please prepare my burger No onion.

examples.es: Por favor, ponme un perrito caliente sin cebolla.
examples.en: Please give me a hot dog No onion.

cards.example_sentence: Please prepare my sandwich No onion.
cards.example_es: Por favor, prepare mi sándwich sin cebolla.
cards.example_en: Please prepare my sandwich No onion.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a No Onion sign with a sin wave spilling over a bowl (cebula).

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that there is no milk.

examples.es: Quiero un café solo, sin leche, por favor.
examples.en: I would like a black coffee, no milk, please.

examples.es: Prefiero mi té solo, sin leche, para poder sentir mejor el sabor.
examples.en: I prefer my tea plain, no milk, so I can taste the flavor better.

examples.es: Para el cliente de la mesa tres, un americano sin leche.
examples.en: For the customer at table three, an americano no milk.

cards.example_sentence: I would like a black coffee, no milk, please.
cards.example_es: Quiero un café solo, sin leche, por favor.
cards.example_en: I would like a black coffee, no milk, please.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cow holding a sign that reads No milk, because it’s sin (without) any dairy.

cards.definition_en: An increased amount of water.

examples.es: Quiero más agua, por favor.
examples.en: I would like more water, please.

examples.es: El vaso está vacío, necesito más agua.
examples.en: The glass is empty, I need more water.

examples.es: Después de este café, ¿podría traerme más agua?
examples.en: After this coffee, could you bring me more water?

cards.example_sentence: I would like more water, please.
cards.example_es: Quiero más agua, por favor.
cards.example_en: I would like more water, please.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a thirsty dog shouting más agua for more water.

cards.definition_en: A second napkin, used as a replacement or additional one.
collocations: spill the sauce, get another napkin

examples.es: Mi pastel se desmorona mucho, ¿podrías pasarme otra servilleta?
examples.en: My pastry is really crumbly, could you hand me another napkin?

examples.es: Se me cayó un poco de café, ¿me traes otra servilleta?
examples.en: I spilled some coffee, can you bring me another napkin?

examples.es: Usé esta para limpiarme la boca y está llena de salsa, ¿puedo tener otra servilleta?
examples.en: I used this one to wipe my mouth and it's covered in sauce, can I have another napkin?

cards.example_sentence: My pastry is really crumbly, could you hand me another napkin?
cards.example_es: Mi pastel se desmorona mucho, ¿podrías pasarme otra servilleta?
cards.example_en: My pastry is really crumbly, could you hand me another napkin?
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a second napkin, because 'another napkin' sounds like 'otra napkin' in Spanish.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the table is not clean.

examples.es: Por favor, limpia este lugar porque la mesa está sucia.
examples.en: Please clean this spot because the table is dirty.

examples.es: No puedo sentarme aquí, la mesa está sucia.
examples.en: I cannot sit here, the table is dirty.

examples.es: El camarero no ha limpiado nada y la mesa está sucia.
examples.en: The waiter has not cleaned anything and the table is dirty.

cards.example_sentence: Please clean this spot because the table is dirty.
cards.example_es: Por favor, limpia este lugar porque la mesa está sucia.
cards.example_en: Please clean this spot because the table is dirty.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a table covered in mud, just like a sucia mesa.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that something tastes very good.

examples.es: Prueba este croissant recién horneado, está delicioso.
examples.en: Try this freshly baked croissant, It is delicious.

examples.es: Prueba este café, está delicioso.
examples.en: Try this coffee, It is delicious.

examples.es: La tarta de manzana que pedimos está delicioso.
examples.en: The apple pie we ordered It is delicious.

cards.example_sentence: Try this freshly baked croissant, It is delicious.
cards.example_es: Prueba este croissant recién horneado, está delicioso.
cards.example_en: Try this freshly baked croissant, It is delicious.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a chef tasting soup and saying It is delish-ous while pointing at the menu that reads ESTA.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the temperature is high.

examples.es: Ten cuidado con la sopa, está muy caliente y te puedes quemar la lengua.
examples.en: Be careful with the soup, It is very hot and you might burn your tongue.

examples.es: Cuidado con la taza, está muy caliente y podrías quemarte los dedos.
examples.en: Watch out for the mug, It is very hot and you might burn your fingers.

examples.es: No bebas el chocolate ahora mismo porque está muy caliente.
examples.en: Do not drink the hot chocolate right now because It is very hot.

cards.example_sentence: Be careful with the soup, It is very hot and you might burn your tongue.
cards.example_es: Ten cuidado con la sopa, está muy caliente y te puedes quemar la lengua.
cards.example_en: Be careful with the soup, It is very hot and you might burn your tongue.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture the sun shouting Caliente as the air becomes very hot.

cards.definition_en: A polite phrase said to someone before they start eating, wishing them a pleasant meal.

examples.es: Aquí tiene su café y su sándwich, ¡buen provecho!
examples.en: Here is your coffee and sandwich, enjoy your meal!

examples.es: El camarero nos dejó los platos en la mesa y dijo: ¡buen provecho!
examples.en: The waiter set our plates on the table and said, enjoy your meal!

examples.es: Le entregué la bandeja al cliente y le dije: buen provecho.
examples.en: I handed the tray to the customer and said, enjoy your meal.

cards.example_sentence: Here is your coffee and sandwich, enjoy your meal!
cards.example_es: Aquí tiene su café y su sándwich, ¡buen provecho!
cards.example_en: Here is your coffee and sandwich, enjoy your meal!
cards.mnemonic_en: When you prove a chew, you say enjoy your meal.

title: English C1 Vocabulary
description: Advanced English words and expressions for upper-level learners.

cards.definition_en: to make something clear or easier to understand

examples.es: ¿Podrías aclarar los pasos que debemos seguir para completar el proyecto?
examples.en: Could you clarify the steps we need to follow to complete the project?

examples.es: El abogado tuvo que aclarar una cláusula del contrato que resultaba confusa para ambas partes.
examples.en: The lawyer had to clarify a clause in the contract that was confusing for both parties.

examples.es: El gerente organizó una reunión para aclarar los nuevos protocolos de seguridad con todo el equipo.
examples.en: The manager organized a meeting to clarify the new safety protocols with the whole team.

cards.example_sentence: Could you clarify the steps we need to follow to complete the project?
cards.example_es: ¿Podrías aclarar los pasos que debemos seguir para completar el proyecto?
cards.example_en: Could you clarify the steps we need to follow to complete the project?
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a clear window, 'a clear' view, to clarify the meaning.

cards.definition_en: To give special importance or attention to something.

examples.es: El profesor quiso recalcar la importancia de la puntualidad.
examples.en: The teacher wanted to emphasize the importance of punctuality.

examples.es: El informe médico debe recalcar que el paciente necesita reposo absoluto.
examples.en: The medical report must emphasize that the patient requires absolute rest.

examples.es: La candidata aprovechó su discurso para recalcar los fallos del gobierno actual.
examples.en: The candidate used her speech to emphasize the failures of the current government.

cards.example_sentence: The teacher wanted to emphasize the importance of punctuality.
cards.example_es: El profesor quiso recalcar la importancia de la puntualidad.
cards.example_en: The teacher wanted to emphasize the importance of punctuality.
cards.mnemonic_en: A RECALL CAR EMphasizes the road sign, so you never miss the point.

cards.definition_en: To keep something in its existing state or condition.

examples.es: El edificio requiere reparaciones constantes para sostener su estructura original.
examples.en: The building requires constant repairs to maintain its original structure.

examples.es: Es difícil sostener una conversación fluida cuando hay tanto ruido en la habitación.
examples.en: It is difficult to maintain a fluid conversation when there is so much noise in the room.

examples.es: La empresa debe reducir sus gastos operativos para sostener su competitividad en el mercado.
examples.en: The company must reduce its operating expenses to maintain its competitiveness in the market.

cards.example_sentence: The building requires constant repairs to maintain its original structure.
cards.example_es: El edificio requiere reparaciones constantes para sostener su estructura original.
cards.example_en: The building requires constant repairs to maintain its original structure.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a sturdy stand (sostener) that you maintain, never letting the banner fall.

cards.definition_en: To invite someone to compete or to question the validity of something.

examples.es: Es importante cuestionar las fuentes antes de creer en ellas.
examples.en: It's important to challenge the sources before believing them.

examples.es: El abogado decidió cuestionar la validez de las pruebas presentadas por la fiscalía.
examples.en: The lawyer decided to challenge the validity of the evidence presented by the prosecution.

examples.es: No deberías tener miedo de cuestionar las decisiones de tu jefe si crees que hay una mejor manera de hacerlo.
examples.en: You shouldn't be afraid to challenge your boss's decisions if you think there is a better way to do it.

cards.example_sentence: It's important to challenge the sources before believing them.
cards.example_es: Es importante cuestionar las fuentes antes de creer en ellas.
cards.example_en: It's important to challenge the sources before believing them.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a chalice smashing a question mark—challenge means to cuestionar.

cards.definition_en: To provide evidence or proof that something is true or valid.

examples.es: El investigador debe respaldar sus conclusiones con datos sólidos.
examples.en: The researcher must substantiate his conclusions with solid data.

examples.es: No puedes acusar a alguien de robo sin pruebas que puedan respaldar tu historia.
examples.en: You cannot accuse someone of theft without evidence that can substantiate your story.

examples.es: La empresa necesita documentos financieros adicionales para respaldar su solicitud de préstamo bancario.
examples.en: The company needs additional financial documents to substantiate its bank loan application.

cards.example_sentence: The researcher must substantiate his conclusions with solid data.
cards.example_es: El investigador debe respaldar sus conclusiones con datos sólidos.
cards.example_en: The researcher must substantiate his conclusions with solid data.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a submarine planting a sturdy stance on a ship's back to support it

cards.definition_en: To reject, disregard, or send away someone or something.

examples.es: El juez decidió desestimar el caso por falta de pruebas.
examples.en: The judge decided to dismiss the case due to lack of evidence.

examples.es: La junta directiva optó por desestimar la propuesta de fusión tras analizar los riesgos financieros.
examples.en: The board of directors chose to dismiss the merger proposal after analyzing the financial risks.

examples.es: No deberías desestimar sus preocupaciones, ya que tienen mucha experiencia en este sector.
examples.en: You should not dismiss their concerns, as they have a great deal of experience in this sector.

cards.example_sentence: The judge decided to dismiss the case due to lack of evidence.
cards.example_es: El juez decidió desestimar el caso por falta de pruebas.
cards.example_en: The judge decided to dismiss the case due to lack of evidence.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a missed call being ignored, a dis-miss that dismisses the message.

cards.definition_en: To encourage or promote the development or growth of something.

examples.es: El gobierno quiere impulsar la innovación tecnológica en el país.
examples.en: The government wants to foster technological innovation in the country.

examples.es: Los profesores intentan impulsar un ambiente de colaboración entre los estudiantes de la clase.
examples.en: The teachers try to foster an environment of collaboration among the students in the class.

examples.es: La empresa implementó nuevas políticas para impulsar el crecimiento profesional de sus empleados.
examples.en: The company implemented new policies to foster the professional growth of its employees.

cards.example_sentence: The government wants to foster technological innovation in the country.
cards.example_es: El gobierno quiere impulsar la innovación tecnológica en el país.
cards.example_en: The government wants to foster technological innovation in the country.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a foster parent giving a child a strong push, a force that impulsar forward.

cards.definition_en: To involve or require something as a necessary consequence.

examples.es: Renovar la antigua casa victoriana conllevará derribar varios muros interiores antes de que se pueda instalar la nueva cocina.
examples.en: Renovating the old Victorian house will entail tearing down several interior walls before the new kitchen can be installed.

examples.es: Aceptar la beca de investigación conllevaría viajar al Ártico durante seis meses para recolectar muestras de núcleos de hielo.
examples.en: Accepting the research grant would entail traveling to the Arctic for six months to collect ice core samples.

examples.es: El acuerdo de fusión puede conllevar el despido de hasta doscientos empleados en la planta de fabricación de la empresa más pequeña.
examples.en: The merger agreement may entail laying off up to two hundred employees at the smaller firm's manufacturing plant.

cards.example_sentence: Renovating the old Victorian house will entail tearing down several interior walls before the new kitchen can be installed.
cards.example_es: Renovar la antigua casa victoriana conllevará derribar varios muros interiores antes de que se pueda instalar la nueva cocina.
cards.example_en: Renovating the old Victorian house will entail tearing down several interior walls before the new kitchen can be installed.
cards.mnemonic_en: A tangled tail (en-tail) carries the load, just like conllevar means to involve

cards.definition_en: To make something less severe, harmful, or painful.

examples.es: El gobierno implementó nuevas políticas para mitigar los efectos del cambio climático.
examples.en: The government implemented new policies to mitigate the effects of climate change.

examples.es: Los ingenieros instalaron amortiguadores en el edificio para mitigar el impacto de los terremotos.
examples.en: The engineers installed shock absorbers in the building to mitigate the impact of earthquakes.

examples.es: La empresa ofreció una compensación económica para mitigar el malestar de los clientes tras el fallo del sistema.
examples.en: The company offered financial compensation to mitigate the customers' frustration after the system failure.

cards.example_sentence: The government implemented new policies to mitigate the effects of climate change.
cards.example_es: El gobierno implementó nuevas políticas para mitigar los efectos del cambio climático.
cards.example_en: The government implemented new policies to mitigate the effects of climate change.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a tiny mite gently soothing a blaze, so the fire is mitigated.

cards.definition_en: To make a problem, situation, or feeling worse or more intense.

examples.es: La falta de sueño puede agravar los síntomas de la depresión.
examples.en: Lack of sleep can exacerbate the symptoms of depression.

examples.es: El uso excesivo de fertilizantes químicos puede agravar la contaminación del agua en la región.
examples.en: The excessive use of chemical fertilizers can exacerbate water pollution in the region.

examples.es: No deberías rascarte la picadura, ya que eso solo servirá para agravar la irritación de la piel.
examples.en: You should not scratch the bite, as that will only serve to exacerbate the skin irritation.

cards.example_sentence: Lack of sleep can exacerbate the symptoms of depression.
cards.example_es: La falta de sueño puede agravar los síntomas de la depresión.
cards.example_en: Lack of sleep can exacerbate the symptoms of depression.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an ex‑ace chef adding extra sour sauce, making the dish even worse.

cards.definition_en: To propose or suggest something for consideration.

examples.es: El comité decidió plantear una nueva estrategia para el próximo año.
examples.en: The committee decided to put forward a new strategy for the next year.

examples.es: Durante la reunión, ella se atrevió a plantear una solución alternativa al problema técnico.
examples.en: During the meeting, she dared to put forward an alternative solution to the technical problem.

examples.es: Varios expertos han comenzado a plantear dudas sobre la viabilidad económica del proyecto.
examples.en: Several experts have begun to put forward doubts regarding the economic viability of the project.

cards.example_sentence: The committee decided to put forward a new strategy for the next year.
cards.example_es: El comité decidió plantear una nueva estrategia para el próximo año.
cards.example_en: The committee decided to put forward a new strategy for the next year.
cards.mnemonic_en: Plant a seed and put forward your idea, just like you would plantear a new garden.

cards.definition_en: To direct attention to, discuss, or deal with something.

examples.es: El comité debe abordar el problema del cambio climático lo antes posible.
examples.en: The committee must address the climate change problem as soon as possible.

examples.es: La empresa necesita abordar las quejas de los clientes sobre la calidad del servicio.
examples.en: The company needs to address customer complaints regarding the quality of the service.

examples.es: El profesor decidió abordar el tema de la desigualdad social durante su conferencia magistral.
examples.en: The professor decided to address the topic of social inequality during his keynote lecture.

cards.example_sentence: The committee must address the climate change problem as soon as possible.
cards.example_es: El comité debe abordar el problema del cambio climático lo antes posible.
cards.example_en: The committee must address the climate change problem as soon as possible.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a fancy dress boarding a ship, so you address (abordar) the problem.

cards.definition_en: To find out or establish something through investigation, calculation, or reasoning.

examples.es: Los científicos deben determinar la causa del brote.
examples.en: Scientists must determine the cause of the outbreak.

examples.es: El comité necesita determinar quién será el próximo director ejecutivo de la empresa.
examples.en: The committee needs to determine who will be the company's next chief executive officer.

examples.es: Los resultados de las pruebas ayudarán a determinar si el paciente necesita una cirugía inmediata.
examples.en: The test results will help to determine whether the patient requires immediate surgery.

cards.example_sentence: Scientists must determine the cause of the outbreak.
cards.example_es: Los científicos deben determinar la causa del brote.
cards.example_en: Scientists must determine the cause of the outbreak.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a judge stamping a verdict, saying determine as if shouting the Spanish word determinar.

cards.definition_en: Including all or nearly all elements or aspects; thorough and complete.

examples.es: El manual de instrucciones proporciona una guía exhaustiva sobre cómo ensamblar y mantener el motor paso a paso.
examples.en: The instruction manual provides a comprehensive guide on how to assemble and maintain the engine step by step.

examples.es: El informe final ofrece un análisis exhaustivo de todos los factores que contribuyeron al colapso del puente.
examples.en: The final report provides a comprehensive analysis of every factor that contributed to the bridge's collapse.

examples.es: La universidad ha implementado un plan de estudios exhaustivo que cubre todas las áreas fundamentales de la física cuántica.
examples.en: The university has implemented a comprehensive curriculum that covers all the fundamental areas of quantum physics.

cards.example_sentence: The instruction manual provides a comprehensive guide on how to assemble and maintain the engine step by step.
cards.example_es: El manual de instrucciones proporciona una guía exhaustiva sobre cómo ensamblar y mantener el motor paso a paso.
cards.example_en: The instruction manual provides a comprehensive guide on how to assemble and maintain the engine step by step.
cards.mnemonic_en: A COMPREHENSIVE textbook feels like a comprensivo hug that covers every detail.

cards.definition_en: Having subtle distinctions or variations in meaning, expression, or tone.

examples.es: Su argumento es matizado y considera varios puntos de vista.
examples.en: His argument is nuanced and considers several points of view.

examples.es: La crítica ofreció una visión matizada sobre las causas políticas del conflicto.
examples.en: The critic offered a nuanced view regarding the political causes of the conflict.

examples.es: Necesitamos un enfoque más matizado para resolver este problema cultural tan complejo.
examples.en: We need a more nuanced approach to resolve this complex cultural problem.

cards.example_sentence: His argument is nuanced and considers several points of view.
cards.example_es: Su argumento es matizado y considera varios puntos de vista.
cards.example_en: His argument is nuanced and considers several points of view.
cards.mnemonic_en: New ants add subtle shades to the painting, making it nuanced.

cards.definition_en: Open to more than one interpretation or having an unclear meaning.

examples.es: El mensaje del anuncio era ambiguo, por lo que muchos lo interpretaron de distintas maneras.
examples.en: The message of the ad was ambiguous, so many interpreted it in different ways.

examples.es: La respuesta del político fue tan ambigua que nadie pudo entender su postura real sobre el tema.
examples.en: The politician's response was so ambiguous that no one could understand his real stance on the issue.

examples.es: Debido a que las instrucciones del contrato eran ambiguas, los abogados tuvieron que renegociar las cláusulas.
examples.en: Because the contract instructions were ambiguous, the lawyers had to renegotiate the clauses.

cards.example_sentence: The message of the ad was ambiguous, so many interpreted it in different ways.
cards.example_es: El mensaje del anuncio era ambiguo, por lo que muchos lo interpretaron de distintas maneras.
cards.example_en: The message of the ad was ambiguous, so many interpreted it in different ways.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a vague sign that reads ambi‑guo, reminding you the meaning is ambiguous

cards.definition_en: Logical, consistent, and forming a unified whole.

examples.es: Su argumento es coherente y fácil de seguir.
examples.en: His argument is coherent and easy to follow.

examples.es: El arquitecto presentó un diseño coherente que integra perfectamente la estructura con el paisaje natural.
examples.en: The architect presented a coherent design that perfectly integrates the structure with the natural landscape.

examples.es: Necesitamos una política económica coherente para combatir la inflación de manera efectiva a largo plazo.
examples.en: We need a coherent economic policy to combat inflation effectively in the long term.

cards.example_sentence: His argument is coherent and easy to follow.
cards.example_es: Su argumento es coherente y fácil de seguir.
cards.example_en: His argument is coherent and easy to follow.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a coherent story where every line fits, just like the Spanish word coherente snapping neatly together.

cards.definition_en: Exact and accurate, leaving no room for error or ambiguity.

examples.es: Necesito un reloj preciso para medir el tiempo de la carrera.
examples.en: I need a precise watch to measure the race time.

examples.es: El arquitecto realizó un cálculo preciso de los materiales necesarios para la estructura.
examples.en: The architect made a precise calculation of the materials needed for the structure.

examples.es: La cirujana hizo un corte preciso durante la operación para evitar dañar los nervios cercanos.
examples.en: The surgeon made a precise incision during the operation to avoid damaging nearby nerves.

cards.example_sentence: I need a precise watch to measure the race time.
cards.example_es: Necesito un reloj preciso para medir el tiempo de la carrera.
cards.example_en: I need a precise watch to measure the race time.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a precise surgeon shouting preciso while making exact, razor‑thin cuts.

cards.definition_en: Evoking interest, attention, or admiration in a powerful and persuasive way.

examples.es: El argumento del abogado fue tan convincente que el jurado no tuvo dudas.
examples.en: The lawyer's argument was so compelling that the jury had no doubts.

examples.es: La empresa presentó una propuesta convincente para reducir las emisiones de carbono en la ciudad.
examples.en: The company presented a compelling proposal to reduce carbon emissions in the city.

examples.es: El autor escribió una narrativa convincente sobre los desafíos de la vida en el espacio profundo.
examples.en: The author wrote a compelling narrative about the challenges of life in deep space.

cards.example_sentence: The lawyer's argument was so compelling that the jury had no doubts.
cards.example_es: El argumento del abogado fue tan convincente que el jurado no tuvo dudas.
cards.example_en: The lawyer's argument was so compelling that the jury had no doubts.
cards.mnemonic_en: A compelling speaker convinces the crowd like a confident convict shouting convince

cards.definition_en: A difference or inconsistency between two or more things that should be the same.

examples.es: El auditor encontró una discrepancia significativa entre los registros de ventas y el dinero depositado en el banco.
examples.en: The auditor found a significant discrepancy between the sales records and the money deposited in the bank.

examples.es: Debido a una discrepancia en los datos del censo, el ayuntamiento tuvo que revisar el presupuesto para el próximo año.
examples.en: Due to a discrepancy in the census data, the city council had to revise the budget for the coming year.

examples.es: Hubo una clara discrepancia entre lo que prometió el candidato durante la campaña y sus acciones una vez en el poder.
examples.en: There was a clear discrepancy between what the candidate promised during the campaign and his actions once in office.

cards.example_sentence: The auditor found a significant discrepancy between the sales records and the money deposited in the bank.
cards.example_es: El auditor encontró una discrepancia significativa entre los registros de ventas y el dinero depositado en el banco.
cards.example_en: The auditor found a significant discrepancy between the sales records and the money deposited in the bank.
cards.mnemonic_en: A DISCO and a PANCake on the same plate look mismatched, a clear discrepancy.

cards.definition_en: Something that is accepted as true without proof.

examples.es: El supuesto de que el proyecto será rentable es optimista.
examples.en: The assumption that the project will be profitable is optimistic.

examples.es: Debemos cuestionar el supuesto básico sobre el cual se construyó toda la teoría económica.
examples.en: We must challenge the basic assumption upon which the entire economic theory was built.

examples.es: Su argumento se desmoronó cuando se demostró que su supuesto inicial era completamente falso.
examples.en: His argument fell apart when it was proven that his initial assumption was completely false.

cards.example_sentence: The assumption that the project will be profitable is optimistic.
cards.example_es: El supuesto de que el proyecto será rentable es optimista.
cards.example_en: The assumption that the project will be profitable is optimistic.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a chef who assumes a sup of soup, and that guess becomes the assumption.

cards.definition_en: A way of dealing with a problem or task.

examples.es: El planteamiento del proyecto fue aprobado por el comité.
examples.en: The project's approach was approved by the committee.

examples.es: Su planteamiento para resolver la crisis económica resultó ser muy innovador.
examples.en: Her approach to solving the economic crisis proved to be highly innovative.

examples.es: El entrenador cambió su planteamiento táctico durante el descanso para asegurar la victoria.
examples.en: The coach changed his tactical approach during halftime to secure the victory.

cards.example_sentence: The project's approach was approved by the committee.
cards.example_es: El planteamiento del proyecto fue aprobado por el comité.
cards.example_en: The project's approach was approved by the committee.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a plant reaching out as your approach to a problem

cards.definition_en: A basic structure or system that supports the development or organization of something.

examples.es: El marco de la teoría permite entender los conceptos básicos.
examples.en: The framework of the theory allows understanding the basic concepts.

examples.es: Debemos establecer un marco legal sólido para regular el uso de la inteligencia artificial.
examples.en: We must establish a solid legal framework to regulate the use of artificial intelligence.

examples.es: El proyecto se desarrolló dentro del marco de una colaboración internacional entre universidades.
examples.en: The project was developed within the framework of an international collaboration between universities.

cards.example_sentence: The framework of the theory allows understanding the basic concepts.
cards.example_es: El marco de la teoría permite entender los conceptos básicos.
cards.example_en: The framework of the theory allows understanding the basic concepts.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine Marco the builder erecting a sturdy wooden frame, a literal framework for his house.

cards.definition_en: A particular way of regarding something; a point of view.

examples.es: Desde mi perspectiva, el proyecto tiene mucho potencial.
examples.en: From my perspective, the project has a lot of potential.

examples.es: Es necesario cambiar nuestra perspectiva para resolver este problema técnico tan complejo.
examples.en: It is necessary to change our perspective to solve this complex technical problem.

examples.es: Viajar por el mundo ayuda a los jóvenes a ampliar su perspectiva sobre otras culturas.
examples.en: Traveling the world helps young people broaden their perspective on other cultures.

cards.example_sentence: From my perspective, the project has a lot of potential.
cards.example_es: Desde mi perspectiva, el proyecto tiene mucho potencial.
cards.example_en: From my perspective, the project has a lot of potential.
cards.mnemonic_en: See a pair of spectacles shifting your view—just like the Spanish perspectiVA.

cards.definition_en: A piece of information discovered as a result of investigation or research.

examples.es: El hallazgo del arqueólogo cambió la comprensión de la civilización.
examples.en: The archaeologist's finding changed the understanding of the civilization.

examples.es: El hallazgo de una nueva especie de planta en la selva sorprendió a los científicos.
examples.en: The finding of a new plant species in the jungle surprised the scientists.

examples.es: La policía presentó el hallazgo de pruebas clave que incriminan al sospechoso.
examples.en: The police presented the finding of key evidence that incriminates the suspect.

cards.example_sentence: The archaeologist's finding changed the understanding of the civilization.
cards.example_es: El hallazgo del arqueólogo cambió la comprensión de la civilización.
cards.example_en: The archaeologist's finding changed the understanding of the civilization.
cards.mnemonic_en: Finding a hall a‑go, I discovered the hidden treasure.

cards.definition_en: Evidence is information or objects that support a claim, belief, or conclusion.

examples.es: La evidencia sugiere que el sospechoso estaba en la escena del crimen.
examples.en: The evidence suggests that the suspect was at the crime scene.

examples.es: Los científicos presentaron evidencia irrefutable que respalda su nueva teoría sobre el cambio climático.
examples.en: The scientists presented irrefutable evidence that supports their new theory on climate change.

examples.es: El fiscal no pudo encontrar suficiente evidencia para condenar al acusado durante el juicio.
examples.en: The prosecutor could not find enough evidence to convict the defendant during the trial.

cards.example_sentence: The evidence suggests that the suspect was at the crime scene.
cards.example_es: La evidencia sugiere que el sospechoso estaba en la escena del crimen.
cards.example_en: The evidence suggests that the suspect was at the crime scene.
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of Eve's dance on a courtroom floor as the evidence.

cards.definition_en: A limitation or restriction that controls what can be done or achieved.

examples.es: La restricción de presupuesto nos obliga a cancelar el proyecto de expansión.
examples.en: The budget constraint forces us to cancel the expansion project.

examples.es: El diseño arquitectónico tiene una restricción importante debido a la inclinación del terreno.
examples.en: The architectural design has a major constraint due to the slope of the land.

examples.es: Debido a la restricción de tiempo, solo pudimos presentar los puntos más relevantes del informe.
examples.en: Due to the time constraint, we were only able to present the most relevant points of the report.

cards.example_sentence: The budget constraint forces us to cancel the expansion project.
cards.example_es: La restricción de presupuesto nos obliga a cancelar el proyecto de expansión.
cards.example_en: The budget constraint forces us to cancel the expansion project.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a restric-tion rope tightening, turning a box into a strict constraint.

cards.definition_en: Possible to do or achieve; capable of being carried out successfully.

examples.es: El proyecto es viable si conseguimos más financiación.
examples.en: The project is feasible if we secure more funding.

examples.es: Los ingenieros determinaron que la construcción del puente no era viable debido a la inestabilidad del terreno.
examples.en: The engineers determined that building the bridge was not feasible due to the unstable terrain.

examples.es: Debemos buscar una solución viable para reducir las emisiones de carbono antes de que termine el año.
examples.en: We must find a feasible solution to reduce carbon emissions before the end of the year.

cards.example_sentence: The project is feasible if we secure more funding.
cards.example_es: El proyecto es viable si conseguimos más financiación.
cards.example_en: The project is feasible if we secure more funding.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a feasible plan as a feast in a viable garden, showing it can be done.

cards.definition_en: Capable of being maintained over the long term without depleting resources or causing harm.

examples.es: Esta empresa ha implementado prácticas sostenibles para reducir su huella de carbono.
examples.en: This company has implemented sustainable practices to reduce its carbon footprint.

examples.es: El gobierno busca promover un modelo de desarrollo económico que sea sostenible a largo plazo.
examples.en: The government seeks to promote an economic development model that is sustainable in the long term.

examples.es: Los expertos advierten que la sobrepesca en esta región no es sostenible para el ecosistema marino.
examples.en: Experts warn that overfishing in this region is not sustainable for the marine ecosystem.

cards.example_sentence: This company has implemented sustainable practices to reduce its carbon footprint.
cards.example_es: Esta empresa ha implementado prácticas sostenibles para reducir su huella de carbono.
cards.example_en: This company has implemented sustainable practices to reduce its carbon footprint.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a sturdy table that can sustain, its label reads SOSTENIBLE, showing it's sustainable.

cards.definition_en: Describing something that provokes public disagreement or debate.

examples.es: El tema de la eutanasia sigue siendo controvertido en muchos países.
examples.en: The issue of euthanasia remains controversial in many countries.

examples.es: La decisión del árbitro de anular el gol fue muy controvertido entre los aficionados.
examples.en: The referee's decision to disallow the goal was highly controversial among the fans.

examples.es: El autor publicó un ensayo controvertido sobre las políticas económicas del gobierno actual.
examples.en: The author published a controversial essay regarding the current government's economic policies.

cards.example_sentence: The issue of euthanasia remains controversial in many countries.
cards.example_es: El tema de la eutanasia sigue siendo controvertido en muchos países.
cards.example_en: The issue of euthanasia remains controversial in many countries.
cards.mnemonic_en: A heated debate turns the article into a contra verse, making it controversial.

cards.definition_en: Existing or occurring over a large area or among many people.

examples.es: El uso de los teléfonos móviles se ha vuelto muy generalizado en todo el país.
